title: TikTok Shop Manager - US Wellness & Lifestyle Brand
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing US wellness and lifestyle brand looking for a proactive TikTok Shop Manager to take ownership of our shop’s daily operations and help scale performance. We’re looking for someone who understands the TikTok Shop ecosystem, including listing workflows, affiliate growth, promotions, and product compliance coordination.



The Role at a Glance



Manage and optimize product listings, pricing, bundles, and shop merchandising

Handle TikTok Shop listing workflows, including category setup and compliance-related submission requirements

Grow and manage affiliate relationships through outreach, onboarding, and follow-up

Launch flash sales, promotions, and TikTok Shop campaigns

Track GMV, conversion rate, listing performance, and growth opportunities

Coordinate with our team on resolving listing or documentation issues when products require additional review



What You’ll Need



Direct TikTok Shop experience is mandatory — you must have managed a shop for a brand or agency

Experience with product listing approval workflows, restricted-category/compliance issues, or SDS/documentation coordination is strongly preferred

Strong understanding of TikTok content trends and the affiliate ecosystem

Organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working independently

Bonus: Existing creator network and/or Amazon or DTC experience



The Offer



Part-time: 3–4 hours per day

Compensation: $300–$600/month (DOE) + performance bonuses

Long-term opportunity with a supportive US-based team



How to Apply

Please send the following to 

:



Your CV

A short video introduction

Examples of TikTok Shop brands you’ve managed, including results achieved

A brief note on your experience with listing approvals, compliance/documentation workflows, or resolving product listing issues

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
Job Title: Bookkeeper (US-Based Operations)



We are seeking a sharp, proactive, and highly experienced Bookkeeper to take full ownership of our financial records. This isn't just a data entry role; we need a "numbers architect" who catches what others miss, operates with total autonomy, and treats our ledger like a high-stakes puzzle they are determined to solve.



If you are a QuickBooks expert who thrives in a fast-paced environment and prides yourself on presenting insights before they are even requested, you’re exactly who we’re looking for.



Key Responsibilities



Full-Cycle Bookkeeping: Complete oversight of QuickBooks, including sophisticated AP/AR management, complex journal entries, and meticulous ledger maintenance.

Proactive Reporting: Prepare and present monthly P&L, Balance Sheets, and Cash Flow statements with executive-level clarity.

Process Optimization: Audit current workflows to identify "bottlenecks" and implement streamlined, automated processes for maximum efficiency.

Advanced Reconciliation: Handle high-volume bank and credit card reconciliations with 100?curacy, investigating and resolving discrepancies independently.

US Compliance: Manage financial records in accordance with US standards, ensuring readiness for year-end tax preparation and audits.

Platform Integration: Quickly master and integrate secondary platforms (payroll, time-tracking, or inventory) with QuickBooks.



What We’re Looking For:



Experience: Proven track record (3+ years preferred) as a Bookkeeper or Accountant, specifically working with US-based companies.

QuickBooks Expert: You are a power user. You know the shortcuts, the advanced reporting features, and how to troubleshoot the software's quirks.

High Autonomy: You don't need a task list. You see what needs to be done, you do it, and you report the results.

Analytical Mindset: You don’t just move numbers; you understand what they mean for the business and can explain "the why" to leadership.



Tech-Agile: You learn new software at lightning speed and are always looking for tools to make bookkeeping faster and more accurate.



To Qualify – Complete the Assessment and Application Form:

1. Assessment:

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

title: Video Editor – E-Commerce Ads & VSLs (Full-Time)
description:
Hey,

We are a six-figure e-commerce brand in the health niche looking for a reliable, fast, and structured video editor to join our team full-time.

 

---

 

What the Work Actually Looks Like

 

Most of the time you will NOT be creating videos from scratch. Around 80–90% of the work involves re-engineering existing VSLs and short-form video ads — following a provided script, a reference video, and an asset folder. Speed, structure, and reliability matter more than creativity here.

 

---

 

Your Tasks Will Include

 

- Re-engineering VSLs (90 sec – 3 min) based on scripts and references

- Editing short-form video ads for
 and Instagram

- Sourcing relevant clips and assembling edits quickly

- Following pacing and structure closely — clean, simple animations only

- Delivering on tight timelines without chasing



---

 

To Apply, You MUST

 

- Start your application with the phrase: "VIDEO EDITOR PRO"

- Answer all 5 screening questions below  

- Include 2–3 portfolio examples of VSLs or video ads (health niche preferred)  

 

Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

 

---

 

Screening Questions — Answer All 5

 

1. How long would it take you to re-engineer a 5-minute VSL if the script and reference video are provided?

2. How do you source and collect clips efficiently without wasting time?

3. Are you comfortable prioritizing speed and structure over creativity?

4. What editing tools do you use?

5. What is your internet speed and typical turnaround time for a short project?



---

 

What We Offer

 

- $5/hour starting rate with real potential to increase based on performance

- Performance bonuses for strong, consistent work

- Stable full-time position (40 hrs/week) with consistent, structured work

- Clear briefs — no guesswork

- Long-term collaboration for the right person



---



Ready to Apply?

Follow the instructions above, answer all questions, and include your portfolio. We'll be in touch with qualified candidates shortly. Thank you!

title: Photo Selection and Editing Specialist
description:
Role Focus (Primary Responsibility):



The core responsibility of this role is culling and photo selection - reviewing large volumes of images from professional shoots and identifying the top-tier photos that meet the photographer’s creative vision and quality standards.This includes:



* Selecting the best (typically 1 in 10) images from thousands of shots based on composition, emotion, lighting, sharpness, and overall impact

* Understanding and consistently applying the photographer’s style, brand, and artistic eye

* Eliminating duplicates, weak shots, and near-misses to deliver a clean, high-quality final selection

* Acting as a trusted second eye to streamline the post-shoot workflow and save significant time



Secondary Responsibilities:

* Edit and enhance selected images with accuracy and consistency

* Perform photo corrections including:

1. Cropping and straightening

2. Lighting and exposure adjustments

3. Color correction and grading

4. Background cleanup and retouching

* Prepare files for print production and digital delivery

* Ensure all edited images meet brand and client standards

* Organize, rename, and manage photo files efficiently

* Coordinate with the photographer on preferences, revisions, and deadlines

* Assist with light admin tasks related to photo workflows and delivery



Required Qualifications:

* Proven experience in photography, photo editing, or image curation

* Strong visual judgment with a keen eye for selecting standout images

* Proficiency in Adobe image editing software (Lightroom strongly preferred)

* Ability to quickly and accurately review high volumes of photos

* Strong understanding of composition, lighting, and storytelling through images

* High attention to detail and consistency in quality standards

* Organized, dependable, and deadline-driven

* Strong communication skills and ability to take direction on style preferences



Preferred Skills:

* Experience working directly with professional photographers or studios

* Familiarity with Lightroom workflows (culling, tagging, batch editing)

* Knowledge of print-ready file preparation

* Ability to match and maintain a consistent editing style across large batches

* Fast turnaround capability without sacrificing quality





Ideal Candidate:



A visually sharp, detail-oriented professional who naturally sees what others miss—someone who can step into a photographer’s workflow and confidently say, “These are the shots.”This person thrives in high-volume environments, has a refined aesthetic sense, and can act as an extension of the photographer’s creative eye, dramatically reducing post-production time while maintaining exceptional quality.





To fast-track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."



IMPORTANT REMINDER: To advance in the screening process, you must submit the Podio Form. Timely completion is essential to guarantee your application receives prompt attention.



[REQUIRED] Podio Form Link: 
/webforms/
/

title: Copy Director
description:
Circle of Greatness is seeking a highly strategic and performance-driven Copy Director to lead all copy across our
, SMS, funnel, and website marketing ecosystem.

The ideal candidate is both creative and analytical — someone who understands how to craft compelling messaging and optimize it across funnels, campaigns, and web experiences.



Key Responsibilities

Copy Leadership & Strategy



Own and oversee all copy across
, SMS, funnels, and website pages

Define messaging frameworks, campaign angles, and conversion strategies

Guide and develop junior copywriters on tone, structure, and execution

Set clear standards for what “high-performing” copy looks like





Quality Control



Review, edit, and approve all outgoing copy across campaigns and web assets

Ensure consistency in brand voice across all platforms and partners

Maintain a high bar for clarity, persuasion, and conversion effectiveness





Performance & Optimization

, SMS, and web pages

Collaborate on campaign, funnel, and offer strategy

Ensure all deliverables align with partner goals and expectations





Campaign & Funnel Execution



Work closely with junior copywriters to produce high-quality campaigns and funnel assets

Oversee copy for landing pages, sales pages, and key website touchpoints

Support launches for promotions, events, and marketing initiatives

Requirements



Proven experience in copywriting and managing copy teams, preferably in digital marketing

Strong expertise in
, SMS, funnel, and website copywriting

Track record of writing or directing copy that drives measurable results (revenue, conversions)

Experience mentoring or managing junior tea
mbers

Nice to Have

What Success Looks Like

Messaging is consistent, compelling, and aligned across all channels

Junior copywriters are producing higher-quality, conversion-focused work

title: Project Manager

Remote | Full-Time | Cross-Functional Teams

In this role, you won’t just manage timelines—you’ll lead client and internal projects from start to finish, ensuring everything runs smoothly, efficiently, and with purpose.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
READ THIS FIRST



[SHORT INTRO OF OUR COMPANY]



We are a Singapore based company.



Our main core business involves coaching and training a new generation of financial advisors to reach out to more people, transform more lives and build the business of their dreams.



We have coached more than 3000 Financial Advisors and have more than 8 years under our belt in doing so.



Our clients are mainly in Singapore, Malaysia and Hong Kong and we are on track to reaching out to more of them as we speak.



Right now, We are looking for an Executive Assistant to be part of our company, and to be working directly with the Chief Executive Officer (CEO).



As the Executive Assistant of our company, you will be responsible for coordinating, planning events, communicating to the team and clients, and organising all the backend logistics and operations of the company.



More importantly, your main objective is to buy back time for the CEO.



Your position will play an important and crucial role in the team’s success.





[HOW LIFE IS GONNA LOOK LIKE FOR YOU]



You will be involved in the day to day communications and supporting the CEO directly, assisting in random tasks or any tasks that the CEO requires.





There is no limit to duties an executive assistant can handle, which is why if you are taking on this role, you must have a confident, problem-solving-can-do attitude.



We will not sugarcoat anything but here’s how it is like as well.



You WILL be in a high pressure environment that will force you to step up and grow as an individual.



There will be no bullshit beautiful lies, but rather ugly truth - although necessary - but ugly all the same that will poise you for growth.



While it might be intense, the rewards are great.



Bonuses, employee benefits and perks that will ensure you get well remunerated for your efforts.



The “work hard, play hard and work even harder mantra” is here.



Because we are going to be poised for crazy growth and expansion, you will have to put on your thinking cap, initiative and out of your comfort zone to get things done.





You'll get to attend world-class business, marketing and personal development programs for FREE and rub elbows with renowned Asian entrepreneurs and Financial Advisors.



You’ll be working with an international team, and you’ll even get to hang out with them at least once a year at our annual retreat in an exotic location.

description:
Make 10,000 USD by making 200 calls per day. 



Are you a top seller, always hitting targets but feeling capped, doing all the hard work yet your income doesn’t match your effort?



This is your chance to change that. Work hard now, earn more than you ever have, and build the freedom, security, and lifestyle you’ve always wanted. The hours are long — 9-hour EST shifts with a 12-hour availability window, 6 days a week — but the rewards are massive: $600 USD base or commissions, whichever is higher, and uncapped earnings. High performers make $10,000 per month by only making 200 calls per day.

title: Video Editor
description:
Dear Applicant,

Thank you for your interest in working with me.

I am an automotive sales consultant looking to hire a part-time Virtual Assistant who has a Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration and has a strong interest in being a creative video editor. This position is a great opportunity for someone who wants to build valuable skills, grow professionally, and be part of a business with long-term potential.

This role will include on-the-job training, so I am not only looking for someone with experience. I am looking for the right type of person—someone who is dependable, eager to learn, creative, positive, and excited about growing with me as the company expands.

The work will focus on helping create video advertisements that assist people in finding vehicles that match their personality, lifestyle, and needs. In addition to helping people make vehicle-buying decisions, our content is also designed to entertain, engage, and build trust with audiences online.

The person I hire will help with tasks such as:

Creating and editing video ads

Uploading content to multiple social media platforms

Assisting with content organization and workflow

Supporting the company’s marketing and creative efforts

This is a work-from-home position, and because overseas outsourcing will be an important part of growing my business, I am looking for someone who understands the value of being a reliable remote tea
mber. The ideal candidate should already have:

Their own PC or computer

A fast and dependable internet connection

A professional attitude

Good communication skills

A willingness to learn new systems and processes. You will be using various AI software applications such as capcut, Suno Music Maker, and ElevenLabs voiceover to name a few.

The schedule for this position will be:

4 hours per day, 5 days per week

I am looking for someone who does not just want a job, but someone who wants an opportunity to grow as my business grows. I value loyalty, creativity, consistency, and a strong desire to improve. If you are someone who enjoys learning, creating content, and being part of a meaningful and entertaining brand, this opportunity may be a very good fit for you.

Thank you again for your interest. I look forward to learning more about you.

Sincerely,

Denny Burton

title: WORDPRESS DEVELOPER
description:
About Tashi Non-Stop



Tashi Non-Stop is a children's educational platform built for kids ages 4 to 7. We create movement-based, character-driven learning experiences designed to be sensory-rich, engaging, and accessible for all learners, especially neurodiverse children. Our courses combine music, storytelling, and physical activity so that learning never feels passive.



We are a small, passionate team on a mission to make every child, including those with ADHD, sensory processing differences, and other learning needs, feel like learning was made just for them.



What You'll Build



Frame of Fame

- Public art gallery for kids

- Private dashboard for artwork uploads

- Public gallery visible to all visitors

- Publish/unpublish functionality with parental consent

- Course-based categorization

- Simple, child-friendly UI



Super Secret Cinema Club

- Subscription-based video experience

- Treehouse-style entry experience

- Video playback via Vimeo

- Subscription-gated access

- No pricing shown in the child-facing UI

- Cinematic, immersive interface



Scope Boundaries



Your role is to build features and connect systems, not redesign or create content. This role does not include:

- Landing pages or funnels

-
 marketing or automation

- Affiliate systems

- Content creation such as videos, graphics, or similar assets



We already have: a WordPress and Tutor LMS setup, all content including videos, games, and printables, and a defined brand identity.



Ideal Candidate



We're looking for someone who is:

- Experienced in custom WordPress builds, not just theme editing

- Comfortable with LMS platforms such as Tutor LMS, LearnDash, or similar

- Able to build clean, responsive, mobile-first interfaces

- Detail-oriented and able to follow a design system with minimal direction

- Works independently with clear, proactive communication



Bonus: Nice to Have



- Experience with membership or gated content systems

- Experience with media-heavy platforms

- Performance optimization skills

- Background in children's education or neurodivergent-friendly design



Design Note



This is not a corporate website. Our brand is playful, colorful, character-driven, and ADHD-friendly. You must be able to translate bold designs into engaging UI without defaulting to generic templates.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:

- Links to relevant WordPress projects, especially LMS, membership, or media platforms

- Answers to these two questions:

1. How would you structure a public gallery and private upload system in WordPress?

2. How would you ensure fast loading for video-heavy pages?

- Your availability and timezone



Send your application to 
 your cover letter response above and any relevant work samples or links.



A note from our founder:



We value clean execution, clear communication, and thoughtful UX. This project is about creating something magical, simple, and meaningful for children, not just shipping features. If that excites you, we'd love to meet you.

title: Virtual assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant (Remote) 



Sargent Connects



Location: Remote (Philippines based, working UK business hours) Hours: Full-time,

Monday to Friday Pay: 6.00/hr - 10.00/hr USD depending on technical ability Type: Longterm, stable role

This is not a general admin role.



If you are looking for a job where you just reply to
s, do basic data entry, and

clock off, this is not for you.



This is a role for someone who thinks like a technical operator. 

Someone who understands how systems connect, how data flows, and how to build automations that do not break. 

Someone who reads a situation, identifies the technical fix, and makes it happen — without being asked twice.



We are Sargent Connects. We are a fast-growing marketing agency based in the UK, specialising in helping aesthetic and skin clinic owners scale their businesses. We have a small, high-performance team and we are growing fast. 



The founder needs a technical right-hand person who can manage the backend systems, build out GoHighLevel, and make sure the operational rhythm of the business never drops a beat.



That person is not a general virtual assistant. That person is a Technical Operator.



What this role actually looks like:



You will work directly with the founder to run the engine room of the agency. You will own the CRM, the automations, the client onboarding tech, and the daily operational tasks that keep the business moving.



On any given day, you might be building a new GoHighLevel workflow, troubleshooting a broken 
 connection, setting up a new client’s ad account access, managing the 
 task board, or solving a technical problem the founder does not even know exists yet.



You will not be given a rigid task list. You will be expected to work from a priority board and manage your own time to hit deadlines.



You are the right person if:



You have at least 2 years of experience as a Technical VA or Operations Assistant in a marketing agency or fast-paced startup.

You are an expert in GoHighLevel. You know how to build workflows, manage pipelines, set up custom values, and troubleshoot issues. 

You do not need to be taught what this tool is.

You understand Zapier or 
 and know how to connect different platforms reliably.

You are fluent in English, both written and verbal, to a professional standard. 

You communicate clearly, concisely, and proactively on Slack.

You are available and responsive during UK business hours. This is a real-time role, not an async task-completion role.

You are obsessive about detail. You do not let things slip. You test your automations before you say they are done.

You are proactive by default. You do not wait to be told. 

You identify problems before they become fires and you bring solutions, not questions.



This is probably not for you if:

You need to be micromanaged or given step-by-step instructions for every technical task.

You treat this as a side job or one of several clients you are juggling.

You are looking for a simple, low-pressure admin role where you can coast.

You have never built a GoHighLevel workflow or managed a CRM backend.



What you will get

A highly competitive rate of 8.00/hr USD based on your technical experience

and what you bring to the table. We pay above market rate for the Philippines because we expect top-tier technical talent.

Performance bonuses tied to the growth of the business — when we win, you win.

A front-row seat inside a scaling UK agency. You will learn how a real business operates, how clients are managed, and how growth is built.

A long-term, stable role with a team that respects your time and your expertise.

No revolving door. No micromanagement. No nonsense.



How to apply



No CVs. No cover letters. No copy-paste applications.



Fill in the form below. It takes 5 to 7 minutes. Show us how you think, not just what you

have done.



We only consider applicants who apply via the form. If you cannot follow this instruction, you have already told us what we need to know.



Apply here (copy and paste into a new tab): 
/

title: Social Media Manager
description:
## Role



We’re hiring a Social Media Manager to own the strategy, coordination, and execution of social media distribution for some of the fastest-growing podcast brands on the internet. 



You will manage end-to-end social media execution across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,
, X, and LinkedIn, turning podcast episodes into high-performing content that drives millions of views.



You’ll work directly with high-profile entrepreneurs and founders who are building movements, not just audiences. You’ll collaborate closely with a world-class creative team and take real ownership of growth outcomes across multiple high-stakes brands. 



This role is ideal for someone who deeply understands social media, thinks in hooks and distribution, moves fast, and gets energy fro
asurable results.



## What You Own



You own the distribution, positioning, and performance of content once it is ready to publish. That means d
 what gets posted, how it is positioned, when it goes live, how it performs, and what to optimise next. You are accountable for outcomes, not production.



## Role Clarity (Important)



This is not an editing or graphic design role. You will not be editing videos or designing thumbnails. Your responsibility is to ensure content is ready to publish. This means being able to quickly spot spelling or factual errors, incorrect branding or tone, and visuals, thumbnails, or covers that are clearly off-standard. You are not responsible for detailed video QA, edit notes, or design iterations. Editors and designers own production quality.



## Responsibilities

Captioning & Hooks (AI-Assisted): Write click-worthy captions, hooks, and titles using AI and strategic thinking

Content Readiness Checks: Before publishing, confirm content is accurate, on-brand, and free from obvious errors.

Publishing & Scheduling: Upload, schedule, and publish content across YouTube, TikTok, Meta (FB & IG), X, and LinkedIn with zero mistakes.

Creative Awareness: Ensure YouTube thumbnails, IG covers, and episode graphics meet brand standards and are suitable for publishing.

Client Communication: Manage daily communication, approvals, and feedback with clients clearly and professionally.

Content & Trend Research: Track viral trends, analyse competitors, and pitch fresh content ideas weekly.

Performance Tracking: Monitor performance using Metricool and reporting tools to identify wins and optimisation opportunities.

Systems & Ops Support: Maintain clean 
 structures, update weekly distribution schedules, and keep workflows organised.



## Requirements

2+ years managing social media professionally with proven growth results.

Strong understanding of short-form and long-form content performance.

Strategic awareness of editing and design principles (hooks, pacing, thumbnails) without doing the work.

Experience with or familiarity in YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,
, X, LinkedIn, Canva (review and light adjustments only), ChatGPT or similar AI tools, Metricool or similar scheduling platforms.

Highly desired: 
, 
, podcast hosting platforms, transcription tools.

Data-driven mindset with attention to detail.

Native-level written English.

Reliable internet connection.

Available 8AM–5PM AEST.



## Results You’re Accountable For



Maintain a minimum 4% YouTube CTR.

100% on-time, error-free publishing.

Launch at least one successful new content format or growth experiment per client per quarter.

Maintain 95%+ client satisfaction.

Deliver weekly content ideas aligned with strategy and trends.

Produce monthly performance insights with clear next steps.

Maintain clean, predictable content systems.



## Compensation



Base Rate: $8–$10 AUD per hour, based on experience and results.



Performance Bonuses

Monthly Views Bonus

Viral Content Bonus

Quarterly Performance Bonus

Quarterly Innovation Bonus

World-Class Training: Access to elite marketing education and weekly growth sessions.



## Working With Us



We move fast, hold high standards, and expect ownership. This is not a passive role. You are trusted to think, d
, and execute. If you want comfort and predictability, this isn’t it. If you want growth, responsibility, and real impact, you’ll thrive here.



## How to Apply



Resume including links to accounts you’ve grown and clear metrics.



Send a 60-second video pitch covering why your right for the role. This MUST be custom tailored to our business. Your video pitch replaces a cover letter.

description:

- Monitor performance and track key metrics

- Scale and descale campaigns based on performance

- Check ad accounts and profiles regularly for issues or bans

- Handle ad account top-ups via dashboard

Requirements:

 Ads Manager

 Business Manager assets (pixels, ad accounts, pages)

We operate in a fast-paced environment and test products aggressively. You’ll be expected to manage multiple campaigns, ad accounts, and markets at the same time.



This is not a beginner role. You should already be confident inside Ads Manager and able to make decisions without constant guidance.



If you’re someone who waits to be told what to do, this role is not for you.

title: SEO Link Builder (Outreach Specialist)
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and proactive SEO Link Builder who can consistently acquire high-quality backlinks using a range of proven link building strategies. This role requires someone who understands both free (organic outreach) and paid (placement-based) link acquisition methods and knows how to apply them strategically to drive rankings and organic growth.



Key Responsibilities:



Plan and execute scalable link building campaigns across multiple strategies

Build high-quality backlinks using a mix of free and paid methods, including outreach, partnerships, and placements

Consistently deliver up to 30 new quality backlinks per month per website, while maintaining strict quality standards

Manage and execute link building campaigns across multiple websites simultaneously

Prospect, qualify, and prioritise backlink opportunities based on SEO impact

Conduct personalised outreach to website owners, editors, and publishers

Negotiate placements where required while maintaining quality standards

Perform competitor backlink analysis to identify gaps and opportunities

Maintain outreach pipelines and manage relationships with publishers

Track, measure, and report on link performance (rankings, traffic impact, indexation)



Core Link Building Strategies You Must Be Proficient In:



Guest posting (manual outreach and placements)

Niche edits / link insertions

Broken link building

Moving Man Method

Resource page link building

Digital PR / HARO-style outreach

Competitor backlink replication



Backlink Qualification Criteria:

You must demonstrate a strong ability to evaluate link opportunities using the following metrics:



Relevance

Strong topical alignment with our niche

Contextual relevance of the linking page (not just the domain)

Authority

Domain Rating (DR) / Domain Authority (DA)

Referring domains profile

Organic keyword footprint (not just DR as a vanity metric)

Traffic Quality

Consistent organic traffic (via Ahrefs/SEMrush)

Keywords ranking in relevant niches

Avoid sites with inflated or irrelevant traffic sources

Outbound Link Profile

Ratio of outbound links to content

No spammy or irrelevant casino/adult/low-quality links

Editorial standards of the site

Indexation & Visibility

Pages are indexed in Google

Site is actively ranking and not deindexed or penalised

Recent content is being crawled and ranked



Required Skills and Experience:



Proven experience building high-quality backlinks that improve rankings

Demonstrated ability to consistently deliver up to 30 quality backlinks per month per website

Proven ability to manage link building across multiple websites at the same time

Strong understanding of both white-hat and grey-hat link building approaches

Ability to scale outreach while maintaining link quality

Experience with tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Hunter, Pitchbox, or similar

Strong written communication for outreach and negotiation

Ability to identify low-quality or risky links before acquisition



Application Requirement (Mandatory):

As part of your application, you must submit a 3–5 minute Loom video explaining the Moving Man Method.



Your video must clearly cover:



What the Moving Man Method is

How to find link opportunities (step-by-step)

Tools you would use (e.g., Ahrefs, Google search operators)

How you would structure your outreach message

Why this method works and when to use it



Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Junior SEO — Technical SEO, Content Strategy & AEO
description:
Location: Remote 



### About the role

We’re hiring a Junior SEO to support technical SEO, content strategy, and Answer Engine Optimization (AEO). You’ll work closely with the Head of SEO and the content team, and collaborate with product and engineering to improve crawlability, site performance, content relevance, and visibility in search features and answer surfaces.



### Key responsibilities

- **Technical SEO:** Audit sites for crawlability, indexability, site architecture, XML sitemaps, robots.txt, canonicalization, hreflang, structured data, and pagination.  

- **AEO (Answer Engine Optimization):** Optimize content for featured snippets, knowledge panels, People Also Ask, rich answers, and other SERP features; structure content to match question intent and use concise, authoritative answers.  

- **On?page optimization:** Implement and QA meta tags, headings, internal linking, URL structure, and schema markup to support both traditional SEO and AEO goals.  

- **Performance & monitoring:** Use tools (e.g., Google Search Console, Lighthouse, PageSpeed Insights) to monitor indexing, core web vitals, mobile usability, and page speed; recommend fixes.  

- **Content strategy support:** Research keywords and question-based queries, map keywords and common user questions to content opportunities, and assist in creating briefs for writers that align with user intent and AEO best practices.  

- **Content QA:** Review published content for SEO and AEO compliance—ensure clear question/answer formats, use of lists/tables, concise lead answers, optimized headings, metadata, internal links, and image alt text.  

- **Structured data & knowledge signals:** Implement and validate schema markup, FAQ/HowTo schema, and other structured data to increase eligibility for answer features.  

- **Data & reporting:** Track organic traffic, rankings, SERP feature appearances, click-through rates, and conversions; prepare regular reports and share actionable insights with the Head of SEO and content team.  

- **Collaboration:** Work closely with the Head of SEO and the content team to prioritize fixes, develop content roadmaps, and support launches that improve answer visibility; liaise with engineering for technical implementations.  

- **Continuous learning:** Keep up with search engine updates, AEO trends, and recommend process or strategy changes.



### Required qualifications

- **4 years hands on experience** in SEO, digital marketing, or related role.  

- Foundational knowledge of HTML, HTTP, and site architecture.  

- Hands-on experience with Google Search Console and one analytics/ranking tool (Google Analytics, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, or similar).  

- Strong keyword research, content mapping skills, and familiarity with question-based query research.  

- Understanding of featured snippets, People Also Ask, and other SERP features.  

- Familiarity with page speed and Core Web Vitals concepts.  

- Strong written and verbal communication skills; experience working directly with senior SEO and content stakeholders.  

- Detail-oriented, analytical, and able to manage multiple tasks.



### Preferred qualifications

- Experience with CMS platforms (WordPress, Shopify, etc.) and making content/SEO changes.  

- Experience optimizing content specifically for AEO (featured snippets, PAA, rich results).  

- Must be adept in creating, modifying and refining AI prompts to generate content



- Mastery with preposition and punctuations  when editing and approving content is a must



- Experience writing SEO content briefs or managing content production.  

- Knowledge of 
 markup and structured data testing tools.



### Tools you’ll use

- Google Search Console, Google Analytics  

- Screaming Frog, Sitebulb, or similar crawler  

- Ahrefs, SEMrush, Moz, or equivalent (for SERP feature tracking)  

- PageSpeed Insights, Lighthouse  

- CMS (WordPress, Shopify, or equivalent)  

- Excel, Google Sheets;



### What success looks like (first 6 months)

- Complete technical audits and implement recommended high-impact fixes.  

- Improve indexation and resolve major crawl issues.  

- Deliver 20-40 SEO + AEO content briefs a month focused on question-based opportunities.  

- Increase appearances in targeted SERP features (featured snippets, PAA) and establish regular organic performance and SERP-feature reporting to the Head of SEO and content team.



How to apply: Submit resume, a 2-3 minute loom video introduction of your relevant experience, and explaining how to rank on answer engines

title: Trial Reel Account Manager (Instagram Posting & Analytics) – Female Only
description:
As a Trial Reel Account Manager at SimplexMedia, you will be responsible for high-volume scheduling and posting of content on Instagram, specifically for trial reel-only clients. This role requires someone who is highly organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable working at speed while maintaining accuracy.



You will manage mass posting (up to 8 posts per client per day) and support the team by helping track and interpret basic performance analytics.



Please note: this role is execution and analytics-focused and does not involve content strategy or content creation.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Posting & Account Management (Instagram)



Schedule and publish high-volume Instagram content (up to 8 posts per client daily)



Ensure all posts are uploaded accurately, on time, and in the correct format



Follow Instagram optimisation processes when setting up and managing accounts



Monitor trial accounts daily to ensure posting consistency and performance



Quality Assurance



Conduct daily quality checks across all assigned client accounts:



Are Instagram accounts set up correctly?



Are posts scheduled and published properly?



Are all required settings and optimisations in place?



Troubleshoot posting issues quickly and escalate when needed



Analytics Support



Track and record basic Instagram performance data for trial reel clients



Help identify trends in engagement and reel performance



Assist in compiling simple analytics reports for internal review



Administration & Communication



Keep all tasks and account updates tracked in Notion daily



Maintain clear communication with the team via Slack and



Stay on top of assigned administrative tasks and deadlines



Support other operational tasks as required by the General Manager/CEO



Further details will be provided during onboarding.



RESULTS



Accurate, consistent Instagram posting with no major errors



All trial clients receive their full daily posting volume



Performance data is properly tracked and available for review



Issues are communicated early and resolved efficiently



All tasks are documented and updated daily in Notion

title: Production Lead (Channel Manager)
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a Production Lead to take full ownership of our video production pipeline. This role is responsible for ensuring that content is delivered consistently, efficiently, and at a high standard across both long-form and short-form formats.



You will act as the central point of coordination across the entire production process, working closely with creatives, editors, production teams, as well as sales and legal when needed. This is a hands-on role for someone who can manage multiple moving parts, keep timelines on track, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.



What You’ll Do



You will oversee the full production pipeline from ideation through publishing, ensuring smooth coordination between scripting, filming, editing, and final delivery. You will actively manage timelines, follow up with tea
mbers, and make sure deadlines are consistently met.



Part of your responsibility will be identifying and resolving bottlenecks before they impact output, improving workflows, and maintaining a strong production rhythm. You will review edits to ensure alignment with content direction, pacing, structure, and overall quality standards.



You will also manage sponsor integrations by coordinating timelines and requirements in collaboration with internal stakeholders, ensuring all deliverables meet expectations. In addition, you will handle the final upload and publishing process across platforms, including titles, thumbnails, and scheduling.



The expected output includes approximately 2 long-form videos and 4 to 8 short-form videos per month.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone with a strong understanding of YouTube content production workflows and a proven track record working with YouTube content. You should be confident in making decisions that improve performance, engagement, and overall content quality.



Strong English communication skills, both written and spoken, are required as you will be coordinating across multiple teams and stakeholders.



You should have experience managing video production pipelines, ideally within a YouTube-focused environment, along with a working knowledge of editing workflows using tools such as Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar. Familiarity with project management tools like 
, Notion, or equivalent platforms is important, as well as a solid understanding of the YouTube publishing process, including titles, thumbnails, and scheduling.



Candidate Profile



This role requires someone who is highly proactive, organized, and execution-focused. You should have a strong sense of ownership and accountability, with the ability to manage multiple moving parts simultaneously.



Strong communication skills are essential, along with the ability to follow up, push tea
mbers when needed, and hold people accountable to deadlines. You should be detail-oriented with a strong focus on quality, and have a problem-solving mindset with the ability to act quickly when issues arise.



Why This Role Matters



We need a dedicated owner for production to ensure consistency, speed, and quality across all content. This role is critical in solving operational gaps, streamlining workflows, and improving coordination across teams, ultimately increasing output without compromising standards.



Engagement Details

How to Apply



Send your resume, portfolio, and any relevant production or project management experience to:

title: Team Lead
description:
Team Lead – Engagement (Property Investment & Alternative Home Financing)



Location: Remote

Company: Bayuti & CrowdToLive



About Us



Bayuti is a Sharia-compliant, debt-free, and hassle-free real estate investment platform, while CrowdToLive offers innovative alternative home financing solutions. Together, we deliver ethical, accessible, and high-impact property opportunities in the UK and internationally.



We are looking for a Team Lead – Engagement to manage, motivate, and support our Engagement team while also actively contributing to lead engagement activities. This role is crucial in ensuring that every potential investor and homebuyer receives a seamless and professional experience, from first contact to qualification and handover to the sales team.



Role Overview



The Team Lead – Engagement will oversee a team of Engagement Specialists responsible for investor and homebuyer outreach across both Bayuti and CrowdToLive. You’ll lead by example: coaching your team to excel in communication, compliance, and conversions, while also maintaining your own active engagement quota of around 50 calls per day to ensure firsthand insight into lead quality and process efficiency.



This hybrid role combines leadership, performance management, and direct engagement responsibilities, providing a balance between team oversight and personal client interaction.



Key Responsibilities

Leadership & Management



Lead, mentor, and motivate a team of Engagement Specialists to achieve daily, weekly, and monthly targets.



Conduct regular one-on-one sessions, feedback meetings, and performance reviews to support professional growth.



Track tea
trics (calls made, leads qualified, conversion rates) and ensure CRM data accuracy.



Identify training needs and deliver targeted sessions to enhance product knowledge and sales skills.



Prepare weekly performance reports and share insights with the management team.



Direct Engagement & Call Activities



Personally handle around 50 calls per day to engage potential investors and homebuyers, ensuring a deep understanding of the client journey and lead quality.



Act as a role model for the team in demonstrating effective communication, qualification, and rapport-building techniques.



Manage a small personal pipeline to stay connected to the platform’s sales and engagement processes.



Bayuti (Property Investment)



Supervise and participate in investor lead engagement and qualification processes.



Ensure accurate communication regarding investment opportunities, expected returns, and risk factors.



Maintain compliance standards and proper documentation in all client interactions.



CrowdToLive (Alternative Home Financing)



Support and guide tea
mbers in explaining the CrowdToLive model, rental structures, and affordability process.



Ensure smooth movement of clients through CRM stages: from enquiry to readiness for the sales team.



What We’re Looking For



Proven experience as a Team Leader or Senior Engagement Specialist, ideally in real estate, investment, or financial services.



Strong communication and interpersonal skills with a hands-on, proactive approach.



Ability to balance leadership duties with active lead engagement (approx. 50 calls per day).



Excellent organizational, analytical, and coaching abilities.



Experience using CRM tools and managing lead pipelines.



Goal-oriented, self-motivated, and confident working in a remote environment.



What We Offer



Opportunity to lead and contribute to two cutting-edge property and finance platforms.



Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.



Supportive, collaborative team culture with ongoing career development.



Exposure to the fast-growing ethical and Sharia-compliant investment sector.

title: Senior Video Editor [ Pacific Standard Time ]
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________



About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

- Long-term employment with growth potential.

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Consistent weekly workload.

- Direct impact on a fast-scaling global brand.

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.



How to Apply



Submit the following:

- Resume

- Short explanation of why you’re the right fit

- Brief explanation of how you use AI in your editing workflow

- 1 example where you improved video performance (retention, CTR, etc.)

- Portfolio of your best long-form and short-form edits

- Links to YouTube channels or brands you’ve edited for



Learn About Us:









Website:

title: Legal-Based Debt Recovery Agent (UK Debt Recovery
description:
About us 



We’re a UK-based credit management and debt recovery firm supporting small businesses. We're firm, fair, and compliant. We focus on outcomes, but we also care about doing the work properly and maintaining professional standards throughout. We already have a well-established team based in the Philippines, and this role will work closely with them.



The role 

We’re hiring a senior debt recovery specialist to manage a high-volume portfolio of UK debt recovery cases with compliance rigour and evidence discipline. This is a compliance-led role with strong case management: you will assess cases for disputes and escalation, gather and document evidence properly, make sound escalation decisions, and communicate clearly with clients and third parties. The balance between case analysis, documentation, and client communication will vary week to week depending on the portfolio.



You will handle a mix of:

• Commercial debts (e.g., Ltd companies)

• Consumer/sole trader matters where the Pre-Action Protocol (PAP) applies

We will train you on the nuances of UK debt recovery law and process; we are hiring for legal literacy and compliance capability.



Hours 

This role is available part-time or full-time (20–40 hours/week). We can offer 40 hours/week immediately for the right candidate. Please confirm your preferred weekly hours and availability in your application.

Salary and bonuses

Salary is up to PHP 50,000/month for the right candidate (depending on experience and performance), plus performance bonuses. This role is paid in PHP and you’ll be joining an established Philippines-based team.

Key responsibilities

• Assess cases for disputes, defences, and evidence gaps; identify issues early and escalate appropriately

• Gather, review, and document evidence (invoices, correspondence, contracts, payment records) to build a clear case narrative

• Draft clear, professional written communications to debtors, clients, and third parties (letters, evidence summaries, escalation memos)

• Identify when cases require legal escalation (statutory demands, court proceedings, etc.) and prepare appropriate paperwork

• Manage compliance-led processes: ensure all actions follow UK law, maintain audit trails, and document decision-making

• Communicate professionally with clients when required (case updates, escalation recommendations, dispute resolution)

• Maintain excellent case notes, timelines, and follow-up discipline so nothing is missed

• Take ownership of progressing cases daily and working to targets (quality and compliance-focused, not “busy work”)



What success looks like



• Cases are assessed thoroughly; disputes and escalation decisions are sound and well-documented

• Written communications are clear, professional, and legally compliant

• Evidence is gathered systematically and presented persuasively

• Notes are accurate, complete, and audit-ready (dates, amounts, evidence summaries, dispute details, escalation decisions, and next actions)

• You remain calm, professional, and objective under pressure; you can make difficult decisions and justify them

• You take pride in doing things properly, not just quickly



Performance and incentives 



We work toward clear targets and reward performance. Bonuses are based on results and quality (e.g., case closures, evidence quality, compliance with standards, and client satisfaction).

Must-have requirements (please don’t apply if you don’t meet these)



• Legal background (law degree, paralegal qualification, or equivalent) OR 3+ years of experience in a legal-services or compliance-led collections environment

• Experience working in a high-volume legal or collections environment (agency or in-house team)

• Demonstrable experience managing disputes, gathering evidence, and making escalation decisions

• Strong written English and the ability to draft clear, professional legal communications

• High attention to detail and strong personal organisation (case notes and documentation are non-negotiable)

• Professional judgement and emotional regulation: objective and composed, able to make difficult decisions

• Comfortable handling a mixed portfolio (commercial and consumer/sole trader matters)

• Comfortable being client-facing when required: able to communicate clearly and professionally with business owners/clients and third parties

• Understanding of legal/compliance-led debt recovery processes: able to work within due diligence frameworks and understand escalation pathways

Work setup requirements (must-have)

• Reliable laptop/desktop suitable for daily case management work

• Stable, high-speed internet connection and a quiet, private workspace for calls and written work

• Headset with clear audio (noise-cancelling preferred)

• Working webcam and microphone (required for interview, training, and occasional check-ins)

• Backup internet option (mobile data is fine) for continuity

• You must be able to maintain consistent connectivity during agreed working hours

• We provide the calling/VOIP system for debtor calls



Additional experience (beneficial, but not required) If you don’t have these, you can still be a strong fit — please apply if you meet the must-haves.



• UK debt recovery exposure (e.g., familiarity with LBA/PAP, UK court/claims process, or UK compliance expectations)



Fit and standards



This is not a customer service role. We're seeking a legal professional who can accurately assess cases, make sound decisions, and document everything thoroughly. If you prefer a highly scripted environment, avoid written work, or struggle with compliance-driven processes, this role will not be a good fit.

Screening



To be considered, you must complete our short TestGorilla assessment. We will only review candidates who complete the assessment.

title: Marketing/Sales Manager for Youtube/insta/TikTok
description:
About StoryChat.app

StoryChat is an AI character chat and interactive storytelling platform with a fast-growing global subscriber base. We're hiring a Marketing Manager to own our paid acquisition, short-form video ads, and creator outreach across Meta, TikTok, and YouTube. You'll work directly with the founding team and see the impact of your campaigns in real time.





-Plan, launch, and optimize paid ad campaigns on
, Instagram, and YouTube

-Write ad copy designed to maximize CTR and conversion

-Produce short-form video ads for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Reels (CapCut or similar)

-Use AI image and video tools (e.g. Midjourney, Grok, Runway, Claude, Sora, ElevenLabs) to create ad creatives quickly

-Run outreach to YouTube creators — find them, message them, and manage partnership conversations

-Track campaign performance in Google Sheets / Excel and share weekly reports

-Join 3 quick daily stand-ups to stay aligned on priorities and blockers



Must-Haves:



-English proficiency test score taken within the last 5 years (include the score in your application — OnlineJobs.ph test or equivalent is fine)

-At least 1 year of hands-on experience running paid ads on
 / Instagram and/or YouTube

-Experience using AI tools for image or video creation

-Comfortable with Excel / Google Sheets and Google Drive

-Willingness to do direct outreach and cold-message creators

-Comfortable with short daily check-ins and async written updates



Nice-to-Haves:



-Strong copywriting skills with a track record of improving ad CTR

-TikTok or YouTube Shorts video marketing experience

-CapCut or other video editing proficiency

-Portfolio showing ad results (CTR, CPC, ROAS, or growth numbers)



Schedule:



Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Manila time (8 working hours + 1 hour lunch)

3 quick daily stand-ups (~5–10 min each: start of day, mid-day, end of day)

100% remote / work from home



Compensation & Evaluation:



?6,000 per week (? ?26,000 / month), paid weekly

3-month evaluation period, then confirmed long-term full-time upon successful review



What "Successful Review" Looks Like (Month 3 Targets)

You'll be evaluated against clear, measurable KPIs — not vibes. Hitting most of these = full-time confirmation:



Paid ad CTR: Average ? 1.5% on
/Instagram feed ads and ? 0.8% on YouTube in-stream ads

Cost per new paid subscriber (CPA): Under $12 by end of month 3 (baseline improvement of 20%+ from first campaigns)

Creative output: At least 3 new short-form video ads shipped per week (~12/month)

Creator outreach: Minimum 40 creators contacted per month, with ? 3 active partnerships or collabs landed by month 3

Reporting cadence: On-time weekly performance report every Friday with no gaps

Communication: Present and responsive in all 3 daily stand-ups, proactive about flagging blockers



How to Apply

Please send all three of the following — applications missing any item will be skipped:



Your updated resume

Your English proficiency test score (test name, score, and date taken)

Portfolio or samples of ads you've worked on — screenshots, links, or performance numbers (CTR, CPC, ROAS if available)



Bonus (optional but recommended):



1)A 1–2 sentence note on the best-performing ad you've ever run and why you think it worked

2)Connect with me on LinkedIn and send a message here:

title: Virtual assistant/ Administration
description:
Company: All Safe Height Safety Solutions

Location: Melbourne (Remote)



About Us:

All Safe Height Safety Solutions is a Melbourne based height safety company working across a wide range of commercial projects. We provide end to end services including inspections, compliance certification, and installation of height safety systems.

We partner with builders, facility managers, and property owners to deliver practical, compliant, and reliable height safety solutions across all commercial environments



Role Overview:

We are looking for a proactive individual to handle invoicing, quoting, administration, compliance coordination, and customer support. This role is focused on keeping the business organized, ensuring jobs run smoothly, and managing client documentation and communication efficiently.

Key Responsibilities:

• Creating and sending invoices using Xero 

• Preparing and writing quotes for clients 

• Following up outstanding invoices and quotes 

• Cross-checking job details before invoicing 

• Managing
 inbox and responding to enquiries  

• Setting up recurring inspection schedules 

• Data entry and maintaining accurate client and job records 

• Creating and managing spreadsheets 

• Assisting with preparation of SWMS (Safe Work Method Statements) 

• Formatting inspection reports and certificates 

• Maintaining asset registers and compliance records 

• Responding to new enquiries and following up leads 

• Booking confirmations and client communication 

• Sending client insurances and compliance documentation 

• Completing company inductions and onboarding requirements for clients 

• Posting updates on social media 

• Supporting basic
 campaigns 

• Cross-checking supplier pricing



Requirements:

• Experience using Xero (invoicing and basic functions) is essential 

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills 

• Excellent written and verbal communication 

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively 

• Proficiency in Microsoft Office / Google Workspace 

• Reliable internet connection and suitable home workspace 



Bonus:

• Ability to read and understand building plans and drawings is highly regarded 



Benefits:

• Competitive pay: $7–$9 per hour (based on experience) 

• Initially 10–20 hours per week, with potential to increase 

• Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling business



How to Apply:

To apply for this position, please ensure you include a cover letter addressing the following:

• Why do you want to work for All Safe Height Safety Solutions?

Applications that do not include a cover letter addressing these questions will not be considered.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Course Operations and Platform Administrator
description:
As our Learning & Development team grows, we need a skilled and reliable Course Operations & Platform Administrator to own the behind-the-scenes build and maintenance of our courses and scheduling systems. This role exists to free our L&D Manager to focus entirely on content creation, curriculum design, and delivery, trusting that everything will be set up, configured, and running smoothly. 



This is a detail-oriented, execution-focused role spanning multiple platforms, primarily Kajabi, but also Zoom, Calendly, and related tools. You will not be creating course content, but you will be responsible for bringing it to life on the platform, keeping our scheduling systems organised, and ensuring students and mentors have everything they need to show up without friction. 



This role involves low direct contact with students or practitioners. What matters most is accuracy, reliability, and follow-through.
