title: Freelance Credit Control Team (Associate to Senior Officer) – Philippines (Remote)
description:
Freelance Credit Control Team (Remote, Philippines-based, Flexible Hours)



Credit Control Associate, Credit Controller, Senior Credit Control Officer



About Us

The Credit Collections Company Ltd is a UK-based, SME-focused credit management firm. We support clients with credit control and debt recovery using a warm, professional and relationship-led approach.



The Roles

We’re building a flexible freelance pool in the Philippines to support both PAYG (Pay As You Grow) and monthly-credit-control clients. Some clients need one-off support, and others need more regular help. We are recruiting approximately 2 people for each level.

This role suits someone who already has a full-time job and wants to supplement their income, or someone looking for long-term remote work with the opportunity to grow.



Pay (paid hourly in PHP)

Credit Control Associate: ?115/hour (0–2 years’ relevant experience)



Credit Controller: ?173/hour (2–3 years’ credit control/collections experience)



Senior Credit Control Officer: ?202/hour (3–5 years’ credit control/collections experience)



All payments are made in Philippine pesos (PHP), so you never lose out on exchange rates.



What You’ll Do

Chase overdue balances following the agreed client criteria

Maintain accurate records and provide regular updates

Build supportive client relationships; be firm when needed

Escalate queries/unresolved issues to management

Uphold high standards of professionalism and compliance

Support other reasonable office tasks as needed



Requirements

Experience appropriate to the level you are applying for

English proficiency at C1 (Advanced) or C2 (Mastery/Proficient) level is required

Confident with Microsoft Office (Outlook, Excel, Word)

Reliable internet and home office setup

Friendly, empathetic, organised, and calm under pressure



Working Hours & Flexibility

All work (calls and admin) must be completed between 9 am and 6 pm UK time. Typical demand is 2–4 hours per day, but this can vary depending on client needs. No guaranteed minimum hours.



Progression

For the right committed candidate who looks after clients well, you may be considered for a permanent role in future with additional perks (e.g., paid holidays and sick pay). We don't guarantee this, but we love to promote from within.



How to Apply

Submit your CV and a short cover letter stating which level you are applying for. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete an online skills assessment. Only top-performing candidates from the assessment will be contacted for an interview.

title: Senior Debt Recovery Negotiator (UK Debt Recovery
description:
About us

We’re a UK-based credit management and debt recovery firm supporting small businesses. We're firm, fair, and compliant. We focus on outcomes and do the work properly, maintaining professional standards throughout. We already have a well-established team based in the Philippines, and this role will work closely with them.



The role

We’re hiring a senior debt recovery negotiator to progress a portfolio of UK debt recovery matters and increase collections revenue. This is a negotiation-led role with strong case-management discipline: you will secure payments and firm commitments by phone, then accurately document and drive the next action. The balance between calls and case work will vary week to week depending on the portfolio.



You will handle a mix of:

• Commercial debts (e.g., Ltd companies)

• Consumer/sole trader matters where the Pre-Action Protocol (PAP) applies

We will train you on our systems and internal workflow; we are hiring for debt recovery capability and professionalism.



Hours

This role is available part-time or full-time (20–40 hours/week). We can offer 40 hours/week immediately for the right candidate. Please confirm your preferred weekly hours and availability in your application.



Salary and bonuses

Salary is up to PHP 50,000/month for the right candidate (depending on experience and performance), plus performance bonuses. This role is paid in PHP, and you’ll be joining an established team based in the Philippines.



Key responsibilities

• Negotiate payment in full or structured payment plans, securing clear outcomes (date, amount, method, and written confirmation)

• Lead high-friction conversations professionally: build rapport quickly, ask direct questions, manage objections, and maintain control of the call

• Handle common debtor behaviours including delay tactics, avoidance, partial offers, hostility, and “it’s in dispute”

• Identify disputes early, document them clearly, request specifics/evidence, and escalate internally when required

• Communicate professionally with clients when required (updates, clarifying disputes, and progressing next steps)

• Produce clear written follow-ups summarising agreements, deadlines, and next steps

• Maintain excellent case notes, timelines, and follow-up discipline so nothing is missed

• Take ownership of progressing cases daily and working to targets (outcome-focused, not “busy work”)



What success looks like

• Cases move forward consistently and efficiently; you do not allow files to stagnate

• Conversations convert into payments or firm commitments with specific dates and amounts

• Notes are accurate, complete, and audit-ready (dates, amounts, promises-to-pay, dispute details, and next actions)

• You remain calm, professional, and emotionally controlled under pressure, while still being assertive when needed



Performance and incentives

We work to clear targets, and we reward performance. Bonuses are based on results and quality (e.g., collections outcomes, follow-up discipline, and case documentation standards).



Must-have requirements (please don’t apply if you don’t meet these)

• 3+ years of debt recovery/collections experience with negotiation responsibility

• Demonstrable track record of results (e.g., amounts collected, recovery rate, promise-to-pay kept rate, or similar)

• Strong phone-based negotiation and objection handling skills

• Strong written English and the ability to write clear, professional summaries and follow-ups

• High attention to detail and strong personal organisation (case notes and follow-ups are non-negotiable)

• Professional judgement and emotional regulation: firm and persistent without being aggressive

• Comfortable handling a mixed portfolio (commercial and consumer/sole trader matters)

• Comfortable being client-facing when required: able to communicate clearly and professionally with business owners/clients, not just debtors

• Experience working in a specialist collections environment (agency or in-house collections team)

• Regular experience handling customers/clients directly (updates, problem-solving, and expectation management)

• Legal-process literacy: able to work within compliance-led recovery processes, handle disputes/evidence properly, and understand escalation steps (legal background strongly preferred)



Work setup requirements (must-have)

• Reliable laptop/desktop suitable for daily case management work

• Stable, high-speed internet connection and a quiet, private workspace for calls

• Headset with clear audio (noise-cancelling preferred)

• Working webcam and microphone (required for interview, training, and occasional check-ins)

• Backup internet option (mobile data is fine) for continuity

• You must be able to maintain consistent connectivity during agreed working hours

• We provide the calling/VOIP system for debtor calls



Additional experience (beneficial, but not required)

If you don’t have these, you can still be a strong fit — please apply if you meet the must-haves.

• UK debt recovery exposure (e.g., familiarity with LBA/PAP, UK court/claims process, or UK compliance expectations)



Fit and standards

This is not a customer service role. We are looking for a senior negotiator who can close, hold boundaries, and document properly. If you prefer a heavily scripted environment or avoid difficult conversations, this role will not be a fit.



Screening

To be considered, you must complete our short TestGorilla assessment. We will only review candidates who complete the assessment.

title: Meta Ads Video Editor and Static Ads for Scaling 7 Figure Ecommerce Brand
description:
Hey, I’m Gavin, founder of GH2 Cloud, a fast-scaling 7-figure DTC ecommerce brand selling modular “cloud” sofas.



We’ve generated over $1.2m in revenue in the last 6 months primarily through Meta 
 & Instagram) ads, and now we’re doubling down on creative.



We’re looking for a high level Meta Ads Creative Editor who knows how to make ads that convert, not just look aesthetic.



Our product is visual, lifestyle-driven, and emotional (comfort, family, pets, movie nights). Your job is to translate that into ads that stop the scroll and drive purchases.



If you don’t understand direct response or how to hook attention in the first 2 seconds, this isn’t for you.



Your Mission



Turn concepts into high-performing Meta ads across:



VSLs

UGC

B-roll voiceover ads



Every ad must:



Hook instantly

Show comfort + lifestyle payoff

Build trust (proof, reviews, real use)

Convert



Who This Is NOT For



Do not apply if:



You’ve never edited ads for DTC/Shopify brands

You don’t have real Meta ads that actually ran

You mainly do YouTube, weddings, or cinematic edits

You focus on “aesthetic” over performance

You can’t create scroll-stopping hooks



Why This Role Matters



We already have:



Proven product (high AOV, strong demand)

Winning offers

A working ad system



Creative is now the bottleneck.



You’ll work directly with the founder, and your work will directly impact revenue and scaling.



What You’ll Be Editing (Key Angles)



You need to understand and bring these to life:



“So comfortable it feels like a cloud ??”

Family/movie night setups (pit sofa vibe)

Kids + pets (spills, durability, washable covers)

Before/after living space transformations

Modular flexibility (rearranging layouts)

Luxury look without premium price

Problem ? solution (uncomfortable couch ? GH2)

Easy to move boxes



What You’ll Do



Edit VSLs (60–180 sec) with strong pacing, proof, and CTAs

Create AI Voiceover ads using tools like ElevenLabs, etc.

Cut and assemble UGC ads from raw creator footage

Build B-roll voiceover ads from scripts

Create multiple hook variations per concept

Source stock footage, UGC, and B-roll independently

Structure ads using direct response frameworks (hook ? problem ? solution ? proof ? CTA)

Add captions, sound design, and pattern interrupts

Test different angles, pacing styles, and creatives

Deliver multiple ad variations ready for scaling





Requirements



Proven experience editing Meta ads for DTC brands

Experience with VSLs, UGC, AI UGC, and B-roll ads

Strong understanding of what performs on
 & Instagram (Reels, Feed, Stories)

Ability to create high-retention, scroll-stopping hooks

Skilled in pacing, captions, and attention retention

Comfortable using AI tools to speed up production

Able to source content independently



Traits We Want



Strong attention to detail

Ownership mentality (no hand-holding)

Creative + testing mindset

Thinks like a marketer, not just an editor



Perks



Work directly with a fast-scaling brand

High creative volume = fast growth

Long-term opportunity with more responsibility

Performance-based upside

Real impact on revenue (your ads scale = you grow)



How to Apply



Include:



Your best performing Meta ads (REQUIRED)

Brief explanation of your role in those ads

Which angle you’d test first for GH2 and why



If you know how to make ads that actually convert, not just look good, apply.

title: HIRING Full-Time Video Editor for 7 Figures Supplement Brand
description:
***PLEASE ONLY RESPOND IF YOU HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH 6/7/8 FIGURE DTC BRANDS***





About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health supplement space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

- Fully remote role

title: Product Manager - SaaS
description:
gigCMO is a dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



We are seeking a dedicated and dynamic Product Manager to lead and enhance our Digital Church Platform®. The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing the product development lifecycle, managing development resources effectively, and ensuring rigorous final testing processes before releasing software updates. You will also play a critical role in translating the strategic vision held by the founder into actionable roadmaps and product deliverables.



Key Responsibilities:



- Manage the Product Development (PD) pipeline, ensuring alignment with organisational goals.

- Prioritise and allocate development resources efficiently to align with strategic priorities.

- Conduct comprehensive final testing and quality assurance to guarantee smooth, error-free software updates before public release.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and stakeholders to deliver product enhancements that meet user needs and drive platform adoption.

- Communicate clearly and proactively with stakeholders regarding project timelines, milestones, and release schedules.

- Translate strategic vision and high-level ideas from leadership into actionable product roadmaps, user stories, and specifications. 

- Facilitate clear and consistent communication between non-technical stakeholders and technical teams, ensuring all parties are aligned.

- Set up and manage internal systems (e.g. Basecamp and HubSpot) to track backlog, sprints, and milestones.

- Gather feedback from churches and users to shape future features and improvements. 

- Monitor product performance or user feedback loops to inform decisions and prioritisation. 

- Monitor incoming requests via helpdesk and chat channels, triage issues, and ensure timely resolution either directly or by coordinating with the development team.



Qualifications:



- Proven experience in Product Management, ideally within digital platforms or SaaS environments.

- Strong organisational skills with an ability to manage multiple development priorities simultaneously.

- Exceptional attention to detail, particularly in software testing and quality assurance.

- Demonstrable capability in managing software product lifecycles effectively.

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, able to engage stakeholders at various levels.

- Previous experience in digital community platforms or faith-based digital services is advantageous but not essential.

- Experience writing product requirements, specs, and user stories to support development.

- Understanding of user needs in faith-based or nonprofit contexts, particularly around compliance, admin, or community tools, is highly desirable. 

- A mindset geared toward scalability, continuous improvement, and hands-on problem solving in an early-stage SaaS environment.

title: SEMrush Specialist (Remote)
description:
About Us:

gigCMO is a growth consultancy that provides strategic marketing leadership to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs. As part of our ongoing efforts to enhance our clients' digital presence and performance, we heavily rely on SEMrush for data-driven insights and strategy development. We are seeking a SEMrush Specialist to manage our SEMrush platform, analyse its data, and provide actionable recommendations to optimise our clients' digital strategies.





Job Summary:

We are looking for an experienced SEMrush Specialist to oversee the management and analysis of SEMrush data, offering insights and recommendations to various internal teams. This role is critical for developing and refining SEO and digital marketing strategies, based on in-depth analysis of SEMrush data. The ideal candidate will be highly proficient in using SEMrush and have a strong understanding of SEO, PPC, and competitive analysis.





Key Responsibilities:



Manage and monitor the SEMrush platform to track SEO performance, keyword rankings, and overall site health for our clients.

Analyse SEMrush data, providing detailed reports on SEO, PPC campaigns, competitor analysis, backlink profiles, and content performance.

Develop and recommend strategies for improving organic search rankings, increasing website traffic, and optimising digital marketing efforts based on SEMrush insights.

Collaborate with content, SEO, and marketing teams to align strategies with SEMrush data, ensuring all digital efforts are data-driven.

Conduct keyword research using SEMrush to identify high-potential keywords and provide recommendations for content optimisation.

Identify and track competitors' activities, providing insights on their strengths and weaknesses using SEMrush competitive analysis tools.

Stay up to date with SEMrush updates, new features, and industry trends to ensure we are maximising the platform's potential.

Generate regular reports on SEMrush performance metrics for different teams, including SEO health, keyword movements, and traffic changes.

Offer training and support to internal teams on SEMrush best practices and usage to ensure everyone is leveraging the platform effectively.

Work with teams to ensure technical SEO issues flagged by SEMrush are addressed and resolved.



Required Skills and Qualifications:



Proven experience in using SEMrush as a core tool for digital marketing analysis and strategy development.

Strong understanding of SEO, PPC, keyword research, and competitive analysis.

Ability to interpret SEMrush data and translate it into actionable insights and strategies.

Experience in creating reports and dashboards that effectively communicate SEMrush findings to various teams.

Familiarity with SEO best practices, on-page optimisation, and technical SEO.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to prioritise recommendations based on impact.

Strong communication skills to present data and insights to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Familiarity with digital tools like HubSpot, Basecamp, and SharePoint or similar for managing workflows and collaboration.



Preferred Skills:



Experience in SEO strategy development, using SEMrush data as a foundation.

Knowledge of content marketing and its relationship to SEO performance.

Familiarity with Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and other digital marketing tools.

Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a remote work environment.



Personal Attributes:



Detail-oriented with strong analytical skills.

Proactive in identifying trends and making strategic recommendations.

Self-motivated and able to work independently while collaborating with teams across departments.

Eager to stay up to date with the latest SEO trends, SEMrush updates, and digital marketing innovations.

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
APPLICANTS WHO APPLY THROUGH THE LINK BELOW WILL BE SCREENED

title: HubSpot Specialist
description:
•APPLICANTS WHO APPLY THROUGH THE LINK BELOW WILL BE SCREENED•



About us:

gigCMO Ltd. is a HubSpot Gold Partner. We are dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



Position Overview:

We are currently seeking an adept and proactive HubSpot Specialist to join our team. This role is pivotal in driving automation, streamlining workflows, optimising pipeline strategies, and refining reporting mechanisms within our HubSpot environment.





Key Skills and Responsibilities:



Automation Excellence:

•Lead the development and implementation of advanced automation solutions within HubSpot to streamline processes, increase efficiency, and reduce manual tasks.

•Utilise HubSpot's automation tools, such as workflows, sequences, and bots, to orchestrate seamless customer journeys, automate repetitive tasks, and improve lead management processes.

•Collaborate closely with tea
mbers to identify opportunities for automation across various departments and implement solutions to drive productivity gains.

•Continuously monitor and optimise automation performance, leveraging data insights to refine workflows and ensure maximum effectiveness.



Workflow Enhancement:

•Evaluate existing workflows in HubSpot and identify opportunities for optimisation and automation to improve operational efficiency and streamline business processes.

•Design and implement custom workflows to support cross-functional collaboration, automate repetitive tasks, enforce standard operating procedures, and ensure data integrity.

•Provide training and support to tea
mbers on HubSpot workflows, best practices, and system capabilities to drive user adoption, enhance productivity, and optimise the platform's use.

•Collaborate with colleagues to develop and implement workflow governance policies, standardisation guidelines, and continuous improvement initiatives to drive ongoing efficiency gains and process optimisation.



Pipeline Development Expertise:

•Lead the design, implementation, and optimisation of sales pipelines within HubSpot, ensuring alignment with business objectives and sales processes.

•Collaborate with sales and marketing teams to define lead scoring criteria, develop lead nurturing strategies, automate lead qualification processes, and accelerate sales cycle progression.

•Continuously monitor pipeline performance, identify bottlenecks, and propose solutions to improve pipeline velocity, conversion rates, and overall revenue generation.

•Develop and maintain comprehensive documentation for sales pipelines, including standardised processes, workflows, and best practices to support scalability and consistency across the organisation.



Reporting Mastery:

•Generate a wide range of reports and dashboards in HubSpot to monitor key performance indicators, track campaign performance, evaluate customer engagement, and provide actionable insights for decision-making.

•Conduct thorough data analysis to identify trends, opportunities, and areas for improvement and present findings clearly and concisely.

•Work closely with colleagues to understand reporting requirements, develop custom reporting solutions, and continuously refine reporting processes to meet evolving business needs.

•Collaborate with tea
mbers to develop automated reporting processes and scheduled reports to streamline data delivery and improve decision-making efficiency.



Qualifications:

•Proven experience in HubSpot administration and implementation, focusing on automation, streamlining workflows, optimising pipeline strategies, and refining reporting.

•HubSpot Certificate (REQUIRED)

•Minimum 2 years of experience

•Familiarity with specific HubSpot modules such as Marketing Hub, Sales Hub, Service Hub, Content Hub, Operations Hub, and Commerce Hub.

•Please specify the HubSpot modules you have worked with and the level-pro or enterprise

•Strong analytical skills and the ability to translate data into actionable insights.

•Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively across teams and departments.

•Detail-oriented with a proactive mindset and a passion for continuous improvement.



Application Requirements: This role demands a full-time commitment and is not compatible with another full-time job.

To be considered, kindly fill out the form using this link: 

****Only successful candidates will be contacted for interviews.*****

title: Custom Animated YouTube Intro
description:
Project Title: Custom Animated YouTube Intro (Girl Vlog / Business Lifestyle)



Description:  

I’m looking for a motion graphics designer or animator to create a custom animated intro for my YouTube channel. I want a cartoon/stylized version of me that reflects both my business life and personal life, set in a busy city environment.



Concept:  

The animation will be a short intro (around 5–10 seconds) showing two sides of my lifestyle:

- Business/Salon side: Me working in a salon in a lively city setting (storefront, street traffic, modern city vibe)

- Home/Lifestyle side: Me relaxing at home, eating, with my 2 dogs next to me (cozy apartment/condo in the city)



The animation should smoothly transition between these scenes or creatively combine them, with subtle city elements in the background (cars passing, lights, skyline, etc.).



Style:  

- Feminine / “girl vlog” aesthetic  

- Clean, modern, slightly soft or glowy look  

- Cartoon or semi-realistic (not overly childish)  

- Inspired by lifestyle YouTubers  



Details:  

- Character should resemble me (I will provide photos for reference)  

- Include subtle motion (walking in the city, working in salon, sitting/eating at home, dogs interacting)  

- Optional: channel name appearing at the end  



Deliverables:  

- 1 final intro animation (5–10 seconds)  

- High-quality format suitable for YouTube  

- Transparent background version (if possible)



Bonus (optional):  

- Matching outro or logo animation  



---



Goal:  

I want something that feels personal, aesthetic, and represents my life as both a business owner and at-home lifestyle creator, all within a vibrant city vibe.

title: Mobile App Developer (Bluetooth IoT App – Supercapacitor Jump Starter)
description:
Mobile App Developer (Bluetooth IoT App – Supercapacitor Jump Starter)



We are looking for an experienced mobile app developer to build a high-quality Bluetooth-connected app for a hardware product (supercapacitor jump starter).



This app will connect to our device via  Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE)  and display real-time data, control functions, and stored history.



This is not a basic app — it involves  hardware communication, real-time data handling, and control systems.



There is strong potential for long-term work if the first version is successful.





CORE FUNCTIONALITY



Bluetooth Connection



* Connect to device via BLE

* Handle pairing, reconnecting, and connection stability

* Show connection status (connected / searching / disconnected)





Real-Time Data Display



The app must display live data from the device:



* Car battery voltage

* Capacitor voltage

* Capacitor charge percentage (SOC)

* Charge current

* Discharge current

* Temperature



Data should update in real-time and be clearly displayed.



Control Features



* Manual Force Start button (with safety hold or confirmation)

* Emergency Charge mode activation

* Clear system state display:



  * Charging

  * Ready

  * Discharging





Data Storage & History (IMPORTANT)



The app must support history tracking, including:



* Start history (date, time, success/failure)

* Peak current during start

* Battery voltage before start

* Battery voltage trends over time



This requires:



* Reading stored data from the device (if available)

* OR storing data within the app



UI / UX REQUIREMENTS



* Clean, modern, premium design (automotive style)

* Smooth performance (no lag with live data)

* Easy-to-read dashboard layout

* Clear visual indicators (color-based states)



We already have:



* Reference apps

* UI concept created in FlutterFlow



You will follow these and improve where needed.





TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS



You MUST have experience with:



* Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) communication

* Connecting apps to hardware devices

* Handling real-time data streams

* Parsing incoming data from devices





NICE TO HAVE



* IoT app development experience

* Experience with sensor data / embedded systems

* Experience working with custom Bluetooth protocols

* Flutter / React Native experience

* Ability to work with FlutterFlow export (optional)



WHAT WE WILL PROVIDE



* Full UI reference (FlutterFlow design)

* List of all required data points

* Bluetooth protocol (from hardware team)

* Ongoing support and clarification





PROJECT GOAL



Build a stable, high-quality app that:



* Feels premium

* Works reliably with hardware

* Clearly displays all key data

* Allows full control of the device





WHEN APPLYING



Please include:



* Examples of Bluetooth or IoT apps you have built

* Brief explanation of your experience with BLE

* Your approach to handling real-time data





We are looking for someone reliable and easy to work with.

If this project goes well, there will be ongoing work and future updates.

title: SEO Manager Technical & On-Page for a US Company (Remote and Graveyard)
description:
A) SEO Leadership & Site Optimization (90% of role)

Own SEO strategy execution across the site: on-page SEO, technical SEO, and site health.

Troubleshoot ranking issues and implement fixes independently (e.g., keyword cannibalization, indexing issues, Google algorithm updates).

Monitor tools like SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4 for performance, coverage, and errors; implement solutions quickly.

Maintain on-page SEO: update titles/meta, add internal links, refresh stale content, implement FAQ/schema updates.

Optimize site performance: compress/resize images, lazy-load media, minimize render-blocking assets, and improve Core Web Vitals.

Work with AI tools and automation workflows to enhance SEO and content operations.



B) CRM & Workflow Management (Supportive)

Use CRMs (preferably Go High Level, also familiar with Pipedrive, Salesforce, Zoho) to manage campaigns, leads, and workflows.

Build and maintain automations/workflows for marketing operations.

Collaborate with tea
mbers to align CRM data with SEO and site performance initiatives.



C) Elementor & WordPress Site Management (5–10% of role)

Convert legacy WordPress pages (Classic Editor/HTML) into Elementor using brand-consistent templates and global styles.

Implement technical hygiene during migration: 301 redirects, canonical tags, sitemaps, no-index where appropriate, fix orphan pages.

Stage/publish new pages or updates; QA for design, SEO, accessibility, and SOP compliance.

Basic troubleshooting of front-end issues with HTML/CSS and Elementor.



D) Collaboration, Compliance, & Standards

Follow SOPs, checklists, and QA processes meticulously; suggest improvements proactively.

Maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive content with care, particularly in healthcare/behavioral health contexts.

Communicate clearly with tea
mbers and represent the brand professionally.

Work independently, manage priorities, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Required Skills & Experience

4+ years of hands-on SEO experience, particularly with WordPress sites.

Elementor Pro page-building experience.

Strong on-page and technical SEO fundamentals: site architecture, redirects, canonicals, sitemaps, robots.txt, schema basics.

Experience with SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4, and page speed/Core Web Vitals optimization.

Knowledge of Yoast or Rank Math, media optimization, and basic accessibility standards.

Basic HTML/CSS skills for troubleshooting WordPress/Elementor issues.

Organized, detail-driven, and able to follow SOPs, checklists, and QA processes.

Clear written communication for documentation and updates.



Nice to Have

Building reusable Elementor templates.

Experience with managed WordPress hosting (WP Engine, 
) and CDNs like Cloudflare.

Familiarity with performance optimization tools (WP Rocket, NitroPack, Screaming Frog, PageSpeed Insights, Looker Studio dashboards).

Experience with healthcare or behavioral health content.



Compensation & Schedule

Rate: $9 USD per hour.



Working hours:

4 hours overlap in CST (core collaboration hours).

4 hours fixed Philippine time (must remain consistent each day).

Paid time off: Includes standard US holidays and paid leaves.

Fully remote; virtual collaboration via RingCentral (camera optional except for standups/meetings).

title: virtual assistant
description:
Virtual Assistant & Operations Coordinator (Full-Time)



We are scaling two distinct, high-growth businesses—Acme Carriers (Transport & Logistics) and The Cue Shop (Billiards & Accessories e-commerce)—and need a proactive operational backbone to lead the charge. This is a remote, full-time role for a tech-savvy professional who can juggle administrative precision with creative marketing execution.

???? The Mission

Acme Carriers: You will help expand our transport services into storage, packing, and crane/Hiab work. This includes managing a website overhaul and implementing ServiceM8 to streamline operations.

The Cue Shop: You will relaunch this brand after a 1-year hiatus. Your focus will be on Shopify management, SEO, and aggressive marketing to introduce an expanded product range.

???? Key Responsibilities

Operations & Admin

Inbox & Calendar: Maintain a "Zero Inbox" policy; filter, respond, and flag urgent items. Coordinate complex travel and meeting schedules.

Technical Setup: Implement and manage operational workflows in ServiceM8, Tekmatix, and Xero.

Project Management: Lead the transition to new website platforms and service expansions with strict deadlines.

Marketing & Creative

Social Media: Draft, edit, and schedule high-engagement content for Instagram,
, and TikTok using Canva and Hootsuite.

E-Commerce: Manage the Shopify backend, update product listings, and improve SEO.

Content: Basic video/photo/podcast editing and professional copywriting for web and
.

Advertising: Monitor and assist with Google PPC campaigns to drive traffic.

Financial & Research

Finance: Generate invoices, manage expense data entry, and handle arrears/collections.

Analysis: Perform market research and provide basic reports on CRM data and business growth.

? Required Skills & Qualifications

Experience: Minimum 1+ year in a Virtual Assistant or Executive Assistant role.

Shopify Expert: At least 1 year of hands-on Shopify experience is essential.

Tech Stack: Proficient in Microsoft 360, Google Workspace, and project management tools.

Advantageous: Prior experience with ServiceM8 and Tekmatix (highly regarded).

Marketing Savvy: Understanding of Google PPC, workflow automation, and CRM setup.

Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English with a professional "brand voice."

Creative: Competent in Canva; ability to edit multimedia and write compelling copy.

???? Why Join Us?

Full-Time Stability: Consistent 40 hours per week.

Competitive Pay: Rates are negotiable based on your technical expertise.

Growth: You won't just be an assistant; you’ll be a partner in scaling two unique brands from the ground up.

???? To apply, please provide your resume and a brief cover letter highlighting your experience with Shopify and any CRM automation you have implemented.



Applications to 

Alan Patterson

title: AI-Fluent Book Designer — 30K Word Keepsake, Tight Deadline
description:
READ THIS FIRST

This application requires a 3-minute Loom video and a portfolio link that shows AI-assisted design work. Applications missing either will not be reviewed. I watch every Loom in full. If yours is generic or recycled from other applications, I'll notice and move on.



========================================



ABOUT THE PROJECT

I'm making a book for my 18-year-old niece — a gift I'm giving her before a three-week trip we're taking through Europe together this summer. The book is a primer. She reads it before we leave, and when we arrive in each city, she already has context, history, and appreciation. It's part curated guide, part small art book, part keepsake fro
. This version is spiral-bound so she can carry it with her, lay it flat, write in it, dog-ear pages, live with it.



The manuscript is already written. It's a 30,000 word literary work across 15 chapters — 12 zone chapters covering the trip in itinerary order (Rome, Tuscany, Florence, Venice, the Dolomites, Bavaria, Salzburg, Prague, Paris, and stops between), plus 3 thematic closing chapters on fashion, European historical through-lines, and 18-year-old women throughout history who walked these same streets. It's delivered as a single clean .md file with embedded layout notes, image placeholders, pull-quotes, and a design brief.



You are not writing anything. You are not sourcing imagery. I hand you the manuscript, a locked aesthetic, a folder of approved images (location photography, museum and archival pieces, AI-generated historical scenes), a portrait of my niece, and a personal letter fro
. Your job is to bring it all together into a beautiful PDF ready for spiral binding.



The final piece is a spiral-bound book I'll print through a local print shop like FedEx Office or Staples. Roughly 140 pages, matte color interior, clear acetate or cardstock covers.



Aesthetically — elegant and grown-up, but alive. Not a travel guide. Closer to a small monograph with soul — serious typography, generous white space, and genuine whimsy layered through custom illustration, decorative elements, and marginalia. Fun, unforgettable, and beautifully made.



I am hiring for execution and taste, not vision. The vision is mine. The consistency, the craft, and the pixel-level care are yours.



========================================

WHAT YOU'D ACTUALLY DO



ILLUSTRATION GENERATION. Using my locked style reference, generate roughly 15 chapter opener illustrations, 15 to 20 spot illustrations, and a handful of decorative elements and marginalia. The real work is in the curation — generating 10 to 15 options per slot and selecting the right one, ensuring the whole set feels like one book. Light Photoshop cleanup on AI artifacts as needed.



IMAGE TREATMENT. I'll hand you approximately 40 approved images from mixed sources — location photography, museum and archival pieces, AI-generated historical imagery. Your job is to unify them so the Uffizi oil painting, the Alpine landscape, and the fashion plate all feel like they belong to the same book.



OPENING TREATMENT. The book opens with a portrait of my niece and a personal letter fro
. This is the emotional center of the object. Expect to iterate with me on this spread several times.



COVER DESIGN. Front cover only (spiral binding has no spine). Generate concepts, refine the winner. Type and image should feel integrated, not stacked.



PDF ASSEMBLY. Using Vellum, Affinity Publisher, InDesign, or a comparable tool, ingest the manuscript and build the book. Typography, margins, chapter openers, image placement per the embedded layout notes, page numbers, table of contents, front matter. Design with spiral binding in mind — left-side margins need extra room for the coil punch, nothing critical in the gutter.



PRINT-READY EXPORT. Final PDF properly spec'd for local print shop spiral binding. Single pages, not spreads. Color interior, appropriate resolution, proper bleed if needed.



========================================



WHO I'M LOOKING FOR



THE MUST-HAVES

AI FLUENCY AT A PROFESSIONAL LEVEL. You use Midjourney, Flux, Nano Banana Pro, Ideogram, or similar daily. You understand style references, seed locking, and multi-image conditioning. Your portfolio shows AI work you're proud of, not AI slop.



TASTE AND CURATION INSTINCT. You can generate 15 options and tell me which 3 are best and why. You notice when a set is drifting off-style before I do. If I have to tell you an illustration looks "AI," you're the wrong hire.



LAYOUT SKILL. You've formatted a real book before in Vellum, Affinity Publisher, InDesign, or comparable. You know what a good text block looks like, you care about widows and orphans, and you understand basic print production.



STRONG PORTFOLIO ONLINE. A link I can click. Behance, your own site, a PDF, Dropbox — whatever. I need to see your AI work, your layout work, and your photo editing work.



HIGH AGENCY AND COMMUNICATION. I am not art-directing you every step. You take the brief, flag problems early, send daily progress check-ins, and drive to done. Nothing goes dark.



AVAILABLE FOR OVERLAP. 2 to 3 hours during 8am to 12pm Manila time for reviews and quick syncs.



THE NICE-TO-HAVES

Book design or editorial background. Experience designing for spiral binding. Published work you can point to. Background in illustration or fine art.



========================================



THE DETAILS

SCOPE. One book. Roughly 140 pages finished. Spiral-bound, printed locally. 



TIMELINE. Tight and non-negotiable. Finished print-ready PDF by June 3, 2026. The book needs to be in her hands by early June to give her time to read before we leave June 19. Realistic scope is 30 to 40 hours across roughly 2 to 3 weeks.



RATE. $250 flat, paid as milestones are met — $50 on hire, $50 on approval of illustrations and treated images, $50 on approval of PDF assembly and cover, and $100 on delivery of final print-ready PDF.



DELIVERABLES. Print-ready PDF spec'd for local spiral binding. All source project files. All illustration assets in high resolution. All treated images in high resolution. One organized folder, cleanly named.



LONG-TERM. I'm planning a second, more polished hardcover version of this same book for delivery in December. If this spiral version goes well, you're my first call for that project — and I hire designers I like again for ongoing logo, web, and marketing work beyond that.



========================================



HOW TO APPLY

Please send me the following four things.



FIRST. A 3-minute Loom video introducing yourself. Tell me who you are, show me one piece of AI-assisted design work you're genuinely proud of and walk me through how you made it, and tell me why this project interests you.



SECOND. A link to your portfolio. AI work, layout work, and photo editing work should all be visible.



THIRD. Your favorite AI illustration tool and how you maintain style consistency across a set of images, in two or three sentences.



FOURTH. Answer this question in writing. "I give you a locked style reference and ask you to generate 15 chapter opener illustrations for a 15-chapter book. Walk me through your actual workflow, start to finish."



APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A LOOM AND A PORTFOLIO LINK WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.



========================================



WHAT HAPPENS NEXT

Strong applications get a 20-minute call. From there, I'll select one or two people for a small paid test — generate 3 illustrations against a locked style reference and treat 1 image. $25 flat for the test. Whoever wins gets the full project and starts immediately.



Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Static Ad Designer

We're looking for a skilled Graphic Designer to join our creative team and produce high-converting static ad creatives for paid social campaigns across Meta, TikTok, Google, and more.

title: B2B Outreach Specialist – Commodity Buyers (High Output, Results-Based)
description:
I am building a commodity export operation sourcing agricultural products from Northern Uganda (starting with sesame / sim sim).



I need a fast, reliable outreach specialist to contact real buyers and generate conversations with decision-makers.



This is NOT a passive role. You will be doing high-volume outreach daily.



Your Responsibilities:



* Find and contact importers, distributors, and brands

* Send outreach via
, LinkedIn, and contact forms

* Follow up consistently

* Track all activity in a simple Google Sheet

* Report daily results



Daily Expectations:



* 100–200 outreach attempts per day

* Clear tracking of contacts and responses

* Fast execution (no delays)



Target Buyers:



* Ingredient distributors

* Food manufacturers

* Natural product brands

* Bulk importers



Compensation:



* $4/hour base

* * $50–$100 per qualified buyer conversation

* Potential long-term role for top performers



What is a Qualified Buyer:



* A real company that buys in bulk

* Shows interest in sourcing or reviewing product

* Open to receiving specs, pricing, or samples



Requirements:



* Strong written English

* Experience with outbound outreach or lead generation

* Ability to work fast and handle volume

3. Confirm how many outreach messages you can send per day



Goal:

Generate real buyer conversations within 7 days.



Start immediately.

title: Logistics Coordinator
description:
As a Logistics Coordinator, you will be responsible for coordinating and analyzing logistics operations across multiple transportation modes within the company’s third-party logistics (3PL) and fulfillment business. This role requires strong analytical, data, and math skills, with frequent use of Excel and internal systems to manually build shipping quotes, evaluate cost structures, and coordinate shipments to and from specific destinations.



Your duties will include, but are not limited to:



Logistics Pricing & Quote Analysis:

Build accurate, data-driven shipping quotes using Excel and internal tools for parcel, LTL, FTL, LCL, FCL, last-mile delivery, and specialty shipments. Analyze rates, dimensions, weights, packaging configurations, zones, accessorials, and transit times to determine optimal pricing and routing.



Custom Packaging & Dimensional Analysis:

Evaluate custom packaging requirements and calculate dimensional weight, pallet configurations, container utilization, and cubic efficiency. Develop manual pricing models for non-standard shipments and special client requests.



Shipment Coordination & Execution:

Coordinate shipments from origin to destination across domestic and international lanes. Schedule pickups, deliveries, port movements, warehouse transfers, and last-mile services while ensuring accuracy of shipment details.



Multi-Modal Freight Management:

Manage and coordinate logistics across multiple modes, including parcel, LTL, FTL, LCL, FCL, drayage, and last-mile delivery. Select appropriate transportation methods based on cost, service level, and client requirements.



Client Coordination & Cost Communication:

Work directly with clients to gather shipment requirements, clarify logistics needs, present quotes, and communicate costs, timelines, and delivery expectations clearly and professionally.



Carrier & Vendor Coordination:

Coordinate with carriers, freight forwarders, brokers, and service providers to secure capacity, confirm rates, and ensure service execution aligns with quoted terms.



Data Management, Reporting & Analytics:

Maintain accurate logistics data within spreadsheets, tracking systems, and internal tools. Track costs, margins, transit times, and service performance. Prepare reports and analyses to support operational decisions and cost optimization.



Compliance & Documentation Management:

Collect, verify, and maintain logistics and shipping documentation, including bills of lading (BOLs), packing lists, invoices, customs documents, delivery appointments, and proof of delivery. Ensure compliance with customer requirements, carrier rules, and applicable regulations.



Exception Management & Issue Resolution:

Monitor shipments in transit and proactively address delays, damages, misroutes, shortages, or cost discrepancies. Coordinate internally and externally to resolve issues efficiently.



Finance & Cost Verification Support:

Work closely with the finance team to validate logistics costs, review carrier charges, support invoicing accuracy, and identify discrepancies or cost overruns.



Process Improvement & Optimization:

Identify opportunities to improve logistics workflows, pricing models, routing strategies, and data accuracy. Assist in developing standard operating procedures (SOPs) and analytical tools to improve efficiency and scalability.



General Operations & Analytical Support:

Provide operational and analytical support for logistics initiatives, special projects, system implementations, and continuous improvement efforts as needed.



Your role directly supports the company’s ability to deliver cost-effective, data-driven logistics solutions, maintain operational accuracy, and provide a high-quality experience for clients across all logistics and fulfillment services.





TO APPLY

Your application will not be considered without the following:

 us at 
 with:

-Subject: Your Name – Job Title - Your Hobby

-A short intro about yourself and why you’re a great fit.

-Why do you enjoy this hobby? 

-What keeps you motivated?

-Your resume and OnlineJobs.ph profile link.

-Include a short response (2–3 sentences) to this question:

*What process have you implemented to make a sales or data process more accurate or efficient?

Add your internet speed and computer setup





SKILL REQUIREMENT

Math and Excel

Sales Support

Data Entry

Reporting



If you’re organized, numbers-driven, and love turning messy data into actionable processes, we’d love to hear from you!



Hint: do not use any AI tools to apply; we want to hear from you directly! If you don't hear from us, it's most likely because we've detected AI use or you've missed a step in your application.

This Role Is NOT For You If

title: Instagram DM Setter & Appointment Setter (with Content Support)
description:
We’re looking for a thoughtful, proactive DM Setter & Appointment Setter to support lead generation and conversations on Instagram.



This role is a mix of conversation + light content execution.

You’ll manage DMs, warm up leads, handle objections, and guide aligned prospects toward booking a discovery call.



You’ll also support content by turning provided scripts and videos into simple, effective reels and Instagram stories that drive inbound conversations.



This is not a pushy sales role. It’s about building genuine conversations and helping the right people take the next step.



===What You’ll Be Doing===



1. DM Conversations (Core Focus)



Respond to inbound DMs in a natural, human way

Start outbound conversations with aligned prospects

Ask thoughtful questions to understand their situation

Build rapport and keep conversations flowing

Guide qualified leads toward booking a discovery call



The goal is to help people feel seen and understood, not pressured into a decision



2. Lead Qualification & Nurturing



Identify if someone is a good fit based on their goals and readiness

Warm up leads through ongoing conversation

Handle objections in a grounded, supportive way

Follow up consistently with leads who haven’t replied



3. Booking Calls



Move conversations toward booking a discovery/clarity call

Ensure leads are informed and ready before booking

Track booked calls and conversation outcomes



4. Instagram Content Support



Create simple reels using provided scripts and ideas

Turn existing content/videos into engaging Instagram stories

Post and manage daily story engagement to drive inbound DMs



(You’ll be given video library, direction, scripts, but you’ll also bring your own creativity in execution.)



5. DM Pipeline Management



Keep conversations organised and active daily

Track leads and follow-ups (new, warm, booked, etc.)

Ensure no strong lead is left hanging



===What We’re Looking For===



We’re looking for someone who:



Communicates naturally and builds trust quickly

Is confident asking questions and guiding conversations

Can identify problems and reflect them back clearly

Handles objections without sounding pushy or scripted

Is consistent, organised, and proactive



? Experience Preferred



Experience as a DM setter / appointment setter

Experience working with coaches or online businesses

Strong understanding of Instagram (DMs, stories, engagement)

Basic experience creating reels or short-form content



===Application Requirements===



Please include:



1. CV / Resume



2. Relevant Experience



Have you worked as a DM setter or appointment setter before?

Share the Instagram accounts you’ve worked with

What results did you help generate? (calls booked, leads, etc.)



3. Content Experience



Have you created Instagram reels or stories before?

Share examples (links if possible)



4. Your Approach

How do you handle objections without being pushy?

Days and hours available per week

title: Sports Card Acquisition & Resale Assistant (eBay / Online Marketplaces / Whatnot)
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and market-savvy assistant to support the acquisition, organization, and resale of sports cards across online platforms. This role is focused on identifying undervalued cards, executing purchases on marketplaces such as eBay and other online sources, maintaining organized inventory records, and assisting with live sales on platforms like Whatnot. Full time or Part Time.



This position is ideal for someone with strong analytical skills, familiarity with sports cards (modern and/or vintage), and the ability to operate efficiently in a fast-moving online marketplace environment.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Card Sourcing & Purchasing



Monitor eBay, auction sites, forums, and other online marketplaces for underpriced or high-value sports cards

Identify arbitrage opportunities (buying below market value with resale potential)

Execute purchases quickly and efficiently when deals arise

Track ongoing auctions and manage bidding strategies



2. Market Research & Pricing Analysis



Analyze recent sales data (comps) using platforms such as eBay sold listings, 130point, etc.

Evaluate trends in player performance, card demand, grading impact, and market timing

Recommend purchasing decisions based on ROI potential



3. Inventory Management & Organization



Maintain detailed spreadsheets tracking:

Purchase price

Market value

Card details (player, set, condition, grading status)

Location/status of inventory

Ensure accurate and up-to-date recordkeeping

Assist in categorizing and organizing inventory for resale



4. Sales Support (Whatnot & Other Platforms)



Assist in preparing listings and inventory for live shows on Whatnot

Help price cards strategically for live sales

Support live stream operations (optional but preferred)

Provide input on bundling, promotions, and sales strategies



5. General Operational Support



Communicate deal opportunities quickly and clearly

Maintain awareness of market shifts and emerging opportunities

Assist with scaling buying/selling processes over time

Required Skills & Qualifications:

Strong familiarity with sports cards (basketball, football, baseball, etc.)

Experience using eBay and online marketplaces (buying and/or selling)

Ability to identify value discrepancies and “deals”

Proficiency with spreadsheets (Excel or Google Sheets)

High attention to detail and organizational discipline

Quick decision-making and responsiveness (timing is critical in auctions)

Basic understanding of card grading (PSA, BGS, SGC) and its impact on value

Preferred Qualifications:

Prior experience flipping sports cards or similar collectibles

Familiarity with Whatnot or live selling platforms

Experience using pricing/data tools (e.g., 130point, Card Ladder, Market Movers)

Knowledge of trends in sports and player performance

Comfort working in a fast-paced, opportunistic buying environment

Key Attributes for Success:

Analytical mindset: Ability to assess pricing, trends, and ROI quickly

Speed & decisiveness: Capable of acting fast on time-sensitive deals

Organization: Keeps clean, accurate records without oversight

Market awareness: Understands hype cycles, player performance, and timing

Reliability: Consistent communication and execution

Entrepreneurial thinking: Treats buying/selling as a profit-driven operation

title: Davinci Video Editor (Investing/Finance)
description:
My youtube channel is experiencing its first real wave of growth, and the workload is becoming a 

massive hurdle. I’m reaching out now because I’ve realized I can’t just be a "one-man show" forever.  



The Vision I produce educational "talking head" videos specifically for beginners in the 

investing and personal finance space. My goal is to make high-retention "Visual Essay" 

style—clean, intentional, and data-driven storytelling that keeps viewers engaged through 

complex topics. 



I am currently in the talent scouting phase. This is not a "start tomorrow" hire, as I am spent 

the next few months explore the value a video editor can give me and enough sponsorships 

so that I can pay you. 



The Style & Responsibility 

I am inspired by the clean, modern, minimalist aesthetic and elegant typography of 

Arteri.  



And ‘floating head’ presentation format/layout of Bryan Invest, Nischa, and Deya.  



Footage: I provide 30–60 pre-vetted A-roll clips (under 30 mins total) that are free of 

mistakes. Your task is to tighten the edit by trimming heads, tails, and internal 

pauses. I speak at 150 wpm, but I want the final delivery sped up to 200 wpm to 

achieve a snappy 8–13 minute final product.   



Visual Literacy: It is a massive plus if you have basic investing knowledge. Index 

fund, ETFs, stock market, charts, personal finance. This ensures you know exactly 

which graphics, text charts, or images to use to best illustrate the data, rather than 

just picking generic assets.  



Visuals: I will give you core charts, tables, graphics, research papers, while you 

"filling in the rest". 



Retention: The goal is a cohesive product that maintains at least 50% audience 

retention. 



Communication: Regular updates are required regarding progress or any potential 

technical delays (e.g., internet issues). 



Workflow & Technical Requirements 

Software: DaVinci Resolve ONLY. This is non-negotiable for project compatibility. 



Deliverables: You will provide the DaVinci Resolve project files (.drp) and all raw 

assets. I handle the final 10% for localized compliance. 



Turnaround: 3 days. 



Consistency: Start with 1 video per month. It could scale to 4 videos per month 

as the channel grows. 



Visual Style & Branding 



Brand Guide: I have a full brand guide that must be followed (colors, fonts, layout, 

feel, aesthetic, don’t dos). Make sure you have the skills to replicate my style. 

Otherwise, our partnership will be short-lived.



Please send your portfolio and include the following: 

1. Show me your floating head work.  

2. Work showcasing graphics, tables, charts, numbers and typography. 

3. Confirmation that you work exclusively in DaVinci Resolve. 



Note on Selection Process: Once I shortlist a few candidates, I will send you my brand guide 

and will ask you to perform a paid trial edit. This will involve editing a 60-second clip for a fee 

Your edited version will go  through 1 round of feedback for adjustment before submission. 



I will reply very slow as I’m not in hurry. Thanks for your patience!

title: Operations & Automation VA for US Construction Company (Zapier + QuickBooks Experience Required)
description:
Growing US-based construction company (lead abatement, renovation, general construction) is hiring a part-time Operations & Automation Virtual Assistant to build workflow automations and support day-to-day operations. You’ll work directly with the CEO to streamline how we manage jobs, documents, receipts, and financial data across multiple entities. This is a long-term role with clear growth potential as our portfolio expands.



What You Will Do:

 • Build and maintain Zapier (or Make.com) automations connecting Google Drive, QuickBooks Online, busybusy time tracking, Gusto payroll, and Gmail

 • Design and implement a full job intake automation: PDF risk assessment ? job folder creation ? document templates ? QuickBooks project setup

 • Set up and manage automated receipt processing from Home Depot Pro, Lowe’s, and other vendors

 • Organize and maintain Google Drive job folders using a standardized structure

 • Create and update Google Docs / Google Sheets templates (Scope of Work, Occupant Protection Plans, daily logs, etc.)

 • Manage document merging and PDF generation workflows

 • Monitor automations and troubleshoot issues as they arise

 • Document every automation and process you build (one-page SOP per workflow)

 • Support general operations tasks: data entry, file organization, vendor communication as needed

Required Skills:

 • 2+ years hands-on experience building multi-step Zapier or Make.com automations

 • Strong working knowledge of Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Forms)

 • Experience integrating QuickBooks Online with other tools

 • Comfort working with PDF parsers (Docparser, Parseur, or similar)

 • Excellent written English communication

 • Reliable internet connection and backup power

 • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

 • Willingness to record short Loom videos explaining your work

Bonus Skills (not required but valued):

 • Experience with US construction, contracting, or trades companies

 • Google Apps Script basics

 • busybusy or similar construction time-tracking tools

 • Document automation tools like PandaDoc, Formstack Documents, or PDF.co

 • Basic understanding of bookkeeping concepts (so you can coordinate with our bookkeeper effectively)



How to Apply:

Please do NOT send a generic application. We will only review applications that include all four items below. Take your time — we are looking for the right person, not the fastest person.

 1. A brief paragraph (3-5 sentences) explaining why this role interests you and what kind of automation work you have enjoyed most.

 2. Portfolio evidence: links or screenshots of 2-3 actual Zapier or Make automations you have built. Describe what each one does and what problem it solved.

 3. Your answer to this question: “If a PDF document landed in a Google Drive folder and you needed to automatically create a new job folder, extract data from the PDF, and add a row to a Google Sheet, walk me through the tools and steps you would use.” (3-5 sentences is plenty.)

 4. A 2-3 minute Loom video introducing yourself, showing your face, and briefly describing your most complex automation project. We want to hear your communication style.

Applications missing any of these four items will not be reviewed.

title: Assistant
description:
Position Title: Credit Repair Administrative Assistant



Company: ERWJ Solutions Consulting



Position Overview:

ERWJ Solutions Consulting is seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Credit Repair Administrative Assistant to support daily operations within our credit repair department. The ideal candidate will help monitor disputes, ensure required documentation is submitted, and provide professional communication with clients through our CRM system.



Key Responsibilities:



* Review and monitor credit disputes submitted by clients to ensure accuracy and completeness.

* Verify that CFPB complaints and reports are properly submitted and documented when required.

* Track dispute progress and follow up on outstanding items or missing documentation.

* Respond to client messages inside Go High Level (GHL) in a professional and timely manner.

* Provide updates to clients regarding the status of their credit dispute cases.

* Maintain organized digital records of disputes, responses, and client communication.

* Escalate complex issues or dispute concerns to management when necessary.

* Assist with maintaining workflow efficiency and ensuring all client accounts are being properly monitored.



Qualifications:



* Experience with credit repair, credit disputes, or financial services preferred.

* Familiarity with CFPB complaint process is a plus.

* Experience using Go High Level (GHL) or CRM systems preferred.

* Strong written communication skills.

* Detail-oriented with the ability to review documentation carefully.

* Strong organizational and time-management skills.

* Ability to maintain confidentiality with client financial information.



Skills Required:



* Customer service communication

* Credit dispute knowledge

* CRM management (Go High Level preferred)

* Attention to detail

* Problem solving



Work Environment:



* Remote position

* Must be responsive and able to communicate during business hours.

title: Real Estate Lead Gen & Marketing Assistant (Part-Time / Florida Market)
description:
About the Brand: Vania Bourdeau, PA is a high-end real estate brand focusing on the "move-up" buyer market and luxury new construction in South Florida (Broward, Palm Beach, Miami-Dade, and St. Lucie counties). Our brand emphasizes education, integrity, and personalized service. We are looking for a Growth Partner to manage our pipeline while the Principal is in high-level strategy meetings and property tours



The Role: Your primary mission is to find the business. You will be the "front line" for lead intake and the "hunter" for new construction opportunities. This is not an administrative role; it is a lead generation and brand-building role.



Key Responsibilities:



Lead Management: Monitor and engage leads in Follow Up Boss (FUB). You will be responsible for "Speed to Lead," responding to inquiries via text/email within 10 minutes during your shift.



Builder Outreach: Weekly research into South Florida builders (Lennar, Pulte, GL Homes, etc.) to identify "spec home" inventory, price drops, and financing incentives.



CRM Prospecting: Execute outbound "reactivation" campaigns to cold leads in our database to identify active hand-raisers.



Content Repurposing: Take raw property tour footage and create 3 high-quality Reels/TikToks per week using Canva Pro. Write captions that are professional, friendly, and concise.

title: Lead Generation & Outreach Assistant
description:
Lead Generation & Outreach Assistant 



We are looking for a detail-oriented Lead Generation & Outreach Assistant to support our client acquisition process for our ecommerce marketing agency.



Your role will involve researching and identifying high-quality ecommerce brands, qualifying them based on strict criteria, and supporting outreach efforts through structured
 campaigns.



This is not a high-volume scraping role. We prioritise quality, accuracy, and attention to detail.



Responsibilities

Research and identify DTC ecommerce brands that fit our criteria

Qualify leads based on our internal Brand Qualification Checklist

Find and verify decision-maker contact information

Accurately input data into Google Sheets / CRM

Send outreach
s using our provided scripts

Send and track follow-ups

Follow structured processes for
 timing and deliverability

Requirements

Fluent English (written and spoken)

Do not apply if you are not fluent. If you apply and cannot communicate fluently, the interview will be ended

Strong attention to detail

Comfortable doing online research

Able to follow structured processes precisely

Preferred Experience (Strong Advantage)

Experience building lead lists

Familiarity with DTC ecommerce brands

Familiarity with Shopify stores

Basic understanding of Meta/Facebook ads (Pixel, Ads Library)

Experience with Google Sheets or CRM systems

Understanding of
 deliverability (spotting issues, diagnosing, improving inbox health)

Working Structure

Part-time role

Monday to Friday only

Approximately 3 hours per day



Daily breakdown:



2 hours: Lead sourcing and qualification

1 hour: Outreach 
s + follow-ups)

Daily Targets

10–15 qualified leads per day

s sent to all new leads

Follow-ups sent to previous leads



Important:

If leads do not meet quality standards, they must be replaced before the day is complete.



Lead Sourcing Process



You must follow our sourcing process exactly.



Primary method:



Use myip.ms to find Shopify stores

Browse deeper pages to avoid large brands

Focus on smaller to mid-sized brands



You may also use Instagram suggested accounts to find similar brands.



You are NOT allowed to use tools such as Apollo or large lead databases.



This is intentional.

Our method ensures that the brands we contact are not overly targeted by other agencies.



Brand Qualification Criteria



All brands must meet the following:



Real DTC brand selling physical products (not dropshipping)

Active, legitimate, and currently selling

Product price typically between $40–$200 (unless clearly strong)

Clear hero product (you can understand what they sell within seconds)

Evidence of demand (reviews, activity, engagement)

Based in the United States

Clearly solves a specific problem



Approved categories include:



Health and wellness

Functional food or drink

Skincare or beauty

Personal care or hygiene

Oral care

General problem-solving products



Disallowed:



Clothing or jewellery brands

Pet products

Alcohol, tobacco, vapes

Drugs (THC, CBD)

Gambling-related products

Spiritual brands

Any unclear or non-problem-solving products



Website must:



Be live and fully functional

Have clear product pages

Have strong visuals and branding

Be suitable for paid ads

Ads & Pixel Checks



For each brand:



Check if Meta pixel is installed

Check if ads are currently running



Priority:



Ads + Pixel

Ads only

No ads (only if creatives are strong)



Avoid heavily scaled brands.



Contact Requirements

Identify founder, CEO, or owner

Find and verify personal

Add LinkedIn profile



Do not use generic
s 
 
 & Tracking



All leads must be properly logged.



You must track:



Date initial
 sent

Date follow-up 1

Date follow-up 2

Date final follow-up



This ensures proper spacing and no missed outreach.



 Sending Rules

Maximum 20–25
s per day (including follow-ups)

s must be spread across your 3-hour working period

Do not send
s in bulk or all at once

Do not send multiple
s within minutes



s must be sent within:



United States Eastern Time (ET)

Between 8:00 AM and 6:00 PM



We are able to see when
s are sent.

Failure to follow these rules will be monitored.



This is critical to maintain inbox health and avoid spam issues.



Quality Control



All leads will be reviewed.



Leads will be marked as qualified or not qualified

If leads do not meet standards, they must be replaced

Accuracy and quality are more important than speed

Important



This role is based on:



Attention to detail

Following instructions

Thinking critically about each brand



This is not a task where you copy and paste or rush through work.



If you are organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable working within structured systems, this role is a strong fit.



Please apply with relevant experience and examples of similar work if available.

title: Landscape Estimator
description:

Prepare accurate, buildable, and competitive cost estimates and tender submissions

Interpret complex drawings, specifications, and scopes with minimal supervision

Complete detailed quantity take-offs across:

Earthworks and bulk excavation

Drainage, Irrigation and services

Pavements (concrete, paving, asphalt)

Retaining walls and structural elements

Soft landscaping (planting, turf, irrigation)

Use Groundplan efficiently for precise digital take-offs and markups

Critically assess and level subcontractor and supplier quotes

Identify scope gaps, risks, and cost-saving opportunities during tendering

Maintain accurate and current cost data aligned with market conditions

Minimum Requirements (Applications not meeting these may not be considered)

Proven estimating experience in landscaping, civil, or related construction projects

Junior: 1–3 years with strong fundamentals

Senior: 3+ years with demonstrated project ownership

Strong proficiency in Groundplan (required) and advanced Excel skills. Experience in Simpro an advantage

Ability to produce BOQs independently and accurately

Solid understanding of construction methods, sequencing, and pricing logic

High level of numerical accuracy and attention to detail



Experience pricing end-to-end landscape packages

Ability to identify errors or omissions in drawings/specs

Consistent track record of meeting deadlines without compromising accuracy

Application Requirements (Mandatory)

Updated resume (relevant project experience clearly outlined)

A 2–3 minute video introduction covering:

Your estimating experience (specific project types and scope)

A recent project you priced and your role in it

Why you’re suited to a remote estimating role



???? Submit to: 



Selection Process

Initial screening (resume + video)

Technical assessment

Timed take-off using Groundplan

BOQ preparation with clear assumptions

Final interview (focus on technical and commercial capability)

Important Notes

This role requires independent work and accountability — it is not a training-only position

Only candidates who demonstrate accuracy, efficiency, and strong construction understanding will progress



Join a team that values precision, accountability, and high standards in delivering landscape and civil projects across NSW & Queensland.

title: CPA Accounting & Tax Manager
description:
We are seeking a highly capable, sharp, and client-ready CPA Manager of Accounting & Tax to join our firm. This is a senior role for someone who can operate at a high level across both tax and accounting services, with the judgment, technical strength, and communication skills to lead client work confidently.



This person must be able to perform partner-level income tax return reviews, while also stepping into return preparation when needed. 



They should be well-versed in the broader accounting function, including areas such as payroll, payroll tax, sales tax, bookkeeping oversight, and related client support. Just as important, this person must be an excellent communicator who can interact with clients clearly, professionally, and confidently.



This role is ideal for someone who combines strong technical knowledge with ownership, responsiveness, and sound judgment.



Key Responsibilities

Review business and individual income tax returns at a high technical level, with the ability to catch issues, identify risks, and improve quality before finalization



Assist with tax return preparation as needed, especially during busy periods or when complexity requires senior involvement



Support and oversee accounting services for clients, including bookkeeping review, payroll, payroll tax, sales tax, and related compliance work



Answer technical questions from staff and help troubleshoot accounting and tax issues across client accounts



Communicate directly with clients regarding tax matters, accounting issues, deadlines, open items, and recommendations



Review financial information for accuracy, reasonableness, and completeness

Identify issues proactively and help drive clean, practical resolutions
