title: Video Editor / YouTube Growth Expert
description:
**Job Description: YouTube Video Editor & Growth Strategist**



We are looking for a talented and driven YouTube Video Editor and Growth Strategist to join our team. This is a dual-role position, and both sides of this role carry equal weight. You must bring proven experience and a strong portfolio in both. If you are passionate about building audiences, obsessed with what makes people click and stay, and know how to make a video feel polished and purposeful, we want to hear from you!



**Responsibility 1: Video Editing**



You will be responsible for editing all YouTube content from raw footage to a fully polished, publish-ready video. This is not basic cutting and trimming. We are looking for someone who understands the psychology of retention, knows how to pace a video to keep viewers watching, and can make a talking-head format feel dynamic and engaging.



Responsibilities include editing raw footage into compelling, well-paced YouTube videos, adding graphics, lower thirds, captions, and b-roll where appropriate, maintaining a consistent visual style that reflects our brand, while creating intro hooks that stop the scroll in the first 30 seconds, and delivering videos on deadline without sacrificing quality. Shorts and editing reel type of content will be needed. 



Requirements include a portfolio of edited YouTube videos with demonstrated audience retention performance, proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or equivalent professional editing software, experience with motion graphics and text animation, and a strong eye for pacing, visual storytelling, and brand consistency.





**Responsibility 2: YouTube Growth Strategy**



Editing a great video is only half the job. You will also own the strategy behind how each video performs. This means you understand how YouTube's algorithm works, how to research what audiences are searching for, and how to position every video for maximum discoverability and click-through.



Responsibilities include conducting keyword and topic research using vidIQ, TubeBuddy, or equivalent tools, writing SEO-optimized titles, descriptions, and tags for every upload, designing or directing high-converting thumbnails that are consistent with channel branding, managing the YouTube channel end-to-end including upload scheduling, playlists, pinned comments, and community posts, monitoring analytics to identify what is working and adjusting strategy accordingly, and developing a content calendar aligned with channel growth goals.



**Responsibility 3: General Video Editing**

Beyond YouTube, you will be responsible for long-form video content that lives on our other learning platforms, including editing them into short-form assets that extend our reach across multiple platforms.





**What We Are Building**



Our content is focused on communication, leadership, and professional skills for ambitious professionals. We are growing intentionally and strategically, and we need someone who can help us get there faster without cutting corners. This role is an opportunity to build something from the ground up with a clear vision, an engaged audience, and a founder who is deeply committed to showing up consistently. We are looking for someone who works hard, meets all deadlines, and communicates proactively. 



About us: we are a female-led business that encourages flexibility and autonomy. We are not looking to micromanage; instead, we want to hire people who are self-motivated and responsible and can deliver projects on time. Success in this role means being proactive and communicative, while having fun along the way.



**To Apply**



Please submit your resume, please follow the instructions carefully. All applicants who don't follow will be voided:



Include a cover letter of why you're the right fit. 

Include a resume with previous job experience.

Include a link to a YouTube channel you have edited and grown. 

Include examples of thumbnails you have designed.

Share a brief note on your approach to growing an early-stage channel.

Include any additional social media videos you have edited (doesn't have to be for YouTube)

title: Accounting VA | E-commerce Bookkeeper
description:
We are looking for an experienced, detail-oriented bookkeeper to help us set up QuickBooks Online, integrate it with our ecommerce store, and transition from our current bookkeeping system. This is a project-based role with the potential to grow into ongoing part-time or full-time support depending on fit and performance.



What You'll Be Doing



Set up and configure our QuickBooks Online account (chart of accounts, tax settings, payment methods, preferences)

Connect and integrate our ecommerce platform(s) with QuickBooks Online for automated transaction syncing

Map products, fees, refunds, and sales tax correctly between platforms

Migrate historical data and opening balances from our current system into QBO

Reconcile accounts and ensure books are clean and accurate post-migration

Document processes and provide a handoff/training so we can manage ongoing bookkeeping going forward

Flag any discrepancies or issues discovered during setup





What We're Looking For

Required:



Proven experience with QuickBooks Online (QBO) — not Desktop

Experience integrating ecommerce platforms with QBO (e.g., Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon, Etsy, or similar)

Familiarity with tools like A2X, Synder, or similar ecommerce accounting connectors

Strong understanding of chart of accounts, bank reconciliation, and accrual/cash-basis accounting

Excellent attention to detail and organized workflow

Clear, professional English communication (written)



Nice to Have:



QuickBooks Online certification or ProAdvisor status

Experience with ecommerce sales tax (e.g., Avalara, TaxJar)

Prior experience migrating from [current software, e.g., Wave / Xero / QuickBooks Desktop / spreadsheets]

Experience working with US-based small businesses or ecommerce sellers





Project Scope

PhaseTaskPhase 1QBO account setup & configurationPhase 2Ecommerce platform integrationPhase 3Data migration & opening balancesPhase 4Reconciliation, cleanup & handoff



Work Setup



Location: Remote / Work from home

Engagement Type: Project-based (with potential for ongoing support)

Hours: Flexible — results-driven

Communication: Must be available for check-ins via [Zoom / Slack /
]





How to Apply

Please send a message that includes:



Your experience with QuickBooks Online setup and ecommerce integrations

Which ecommerce platforms you have integrated with QBO before

A brief description of a similar project you've completed

Your availability and project rate (or hourly rate)



Applicants who do not address the above will not be considered. We look forward to hearing from you!

reply to comments and DMs, if the come

title: PROJECT MANAGER · TECH GENIUS - AI EXPERT · ALL ROUNDER
description:
WE’RE HIRING: PROJECT MANAGER · TECH GENIUS - AI EXPERT · ALL ROUNDER

Full-Time | Remote | Education Platform



Our company The Digital Era is evolving and we’re looking for the right person to help run and scale with us in this exciting new chapter.



This is not a junior role.

And it’s not for someone who wants or needs to be told what to do.



We’re looking for a high-level all-rounder who lives and breathes AI, productivity, and tech, and who wants to be at the forefront of where education, marketing, and automation are heading.

_______________________



ABOUT THE ROLE

You’ll be stepping into a core leadership role within our education platform, working closely with the founders and team to:



• Project manage multiple monthly initiatives delivered to our members

• Lead and implement AI tools, systems, and workflows across the business

• Support the evolution of our AI education, trainings, and resources

• Assist in building, launching, and optimising marketing campaigns

• Help streamline operations, productivity, and internal systems using AI

• Manage the tech side working closely with our coders

• Be a key driver in how we scale The Digital Era over the next 12–24 months



This role sits at the intersection of strategy + execution.

_______________________



WHO YOU ARE 

This role is for you if:

• You’re deeply passionate about AI, automation, and the future of tech

• You’re already experienced with AI tools and productivity systems

• You understand digital marketing, funnels, campaigns, and launches

• You’re highly organised and can manage multiple projects at once

• You take ownership, think ahead, and don’t wait to be micromanaged

• You want to build something meaningful, not just “do a job”

• You have min 5+ years in a similar role.



You don’t need to know everything but you must be resourceful, adaptable, and excited to learn fast.

_______________________ 



EXPERIENCE WE’RE LOOKING FOR

• Project management experience (formal or informal)

• Strong expertise of AI tools, workflows, and productivity systems

• Marketing knowledge (campaigns, content, launches, funnels) not a must but desired

• Experience in online education, digital products, or communities is a bonus

• Clear communication, initiative, and leadership energy

_______________________ 



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT

• You’ll be inside a fast-moving, future-focused education company

• You’ll help shape how AI is implemented at scale

• You’ll work with visionary founders and a global community

• You’ll be trusted with real responsibility and room to grow

• This is a long-term role with massive expansion potential

_______________________ 



THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF

• You need step-by-step instructions

• You’re uncomfortable with change or innovation

• You’re not excited by AI, growth, and rapid evolution

• You’re looking for “just a job”



$60k AUD a year to start with room to grow for the right applicant after a 6 month period based on results and commitment.



_______________________  



HOW TO APPLY

Send us:

1. A short introduction video about who you are and why you're perfect for this position.

2. Your experience with AI, systems, productivity, and marketing

3. Why this role excites you

4. Your CV with references

5. Apply here:
salary: Starting at $60,000 AUD salary per year

title: Experienced Funnel and Website Builder Needed for Landing Page and Typeform Build

* Mobile-friendly design for Instagram traffic

Important details:

I want the builder to study my reference very carefully and recreate the overall experience, structure, sequence, and strategy as closely as possible for my brand. This includes the flow of the page, form sections, question order, and the overall user journey.



I will provide the reference link. I want the final result customized to my company, but very aligned with the format and flow of the reference.



Ideal candidate:

title: Digital Strategy Coordinator (SEO & AI Search Specialist)
description:
The Role in a Nutshell



We aren't looking for a traditional SEO technician; we’re looking for a digital architect who understands that the "Search" landscape has fundamentally changed. As our Digital Strategy Coordinator, you will lead the charge in transitioning our SEO efforts from classic blue links to the new era of AI-driven discovery.



You will be the bridge between technical execution and high-level strategy, ensuring our clients don't just rank - they dominate the conversation across Google, ChatGPT, and beyond.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Next-Gen Strategy: Develop and execute SEO strategies that account for both traditional SERPs and AI Overviews (SGE), Perplexity, ChatGPT, and other leading LLMs.

- Technical Excellence: Deep-dive into schema markup, structured data, and Core Web Vitals to ensure flawless crawlability and indexation.

- Content Orchestration: Plan sophisticated topic clusters and use AI content platforms to scale production without sacrificing quality.

- Data Translation: Act as the "source of truth" using GA4 and GSC, turning complex data sets into actionable client-facing reports and strategy docs.

- Team Leadership: Brief and quality-check the work of junior content specialists and developers to ensure every deliverable meets our high standards.

- CMS Management: Get hands-on in WordPress, Webflow, and other similar platforms to implement fixes and optimisations directly.



What You Bring to the Table 

- Proven Track Record: 4+ years in SEO with a portfolio of demonstrable ranking improvements on live sites.

- AI Search Literacy: You understand how to optimize for LLMs and AI search engines, not just legacy algorithms.

- Technical Proficiency: You are an expert in Ahrefs/SEMrush and have a "black belt" in technical SEO (schema, indexation, and site speed).

- Communication Excellence: Native or near-native English fluency. You can write strategy documents that are as persuasive as they are technical.

- Analytical Mindset: You don't just pull data; you interpret it to find the "why" behind the "what."



Bonus Points For

- Local Expertise: Experience with the Australian market and local search nuances.

- Code Literacy: Enough HTML/CSS/JS knowledge to diagnose issues and direct developer fixes.

- Advanced Optimisation: Experience with entity optimisation, knowledge graphs, and AI workflow automation.

- Background: Previous agency-side experience or a background in SaaS.



Why Join Us?

"We don't just follow the industry; we aim to stay six months ahead of it. You’ll have the tools, the autonomy, and the support to experiment with the latest in AI search technology."



Growth: Opportunity to build an AI-led digital strategy service provider from the ground up.

Flexibility: Remote working

Innovation: Access to a suite of advanced diagnostic and AI automation tools.



How to Apply

Think you’re the right fit for the future of search? 



Please send

- Your resume, 

- A link to your most successful case study, 

- A brief note on your philosophy regarding AI Search 



Along with confirmation that you are: 

- OK with screenshot capture software for time tracking; 

- available during Sydney (AEST/AEDT) business hours (10am to 6pm); 

- happy with an exclusive role (no paid or unpaid freelance work on the side);

title: AI Creative Producer (Meta Ads / AI Video) – Full-Time Remote
description:
STRATEGIC AI CREATIVE PRODUCER

Meta Ads | AI Video | UGC | Full-Time Remote

 

 

ABOUT THE NEON COMPANY

 

The Neon Company is one of Europe's fastest-growing custom neon sign brands, active in 13 countries including the Netherlands, Germany, Belgium, the UK, and the US. We create fully custom neon signs for businesses and consumers — from luxury restaurants and cocktail bars to beauty salons, hotels, gyms, and retail stores.

 

We're scaling aggressively and building a performance creative engine on Meta: high-volume, data-driven video ads that generate qualified leads across multiple niches and markets. This role is at the centre of that engine.

 

 

WHAT THIS ROLE IS

 

This is not a standard video editing job.

 

We're looking for one exceptional person who combines the strategic thinking of a performance marketer with the hands-on skills of an AI video producer. You will conceive, produce, and iterate Meta ad creatives that stop the scroll, communicate a clear message, and drive leads — across multiple business niches and multiple countries.

 

You will work directly with the founder and our Meta agency to build a creative testing system from scratch. You own the creative output. You are accountable for results.

 

 

WHAT YOU'LL DO

 

- Produce 5–10 high-quality Meta ad creatives per week using AI video tools (Seedance 2.0, Kling, Runway, Higgsfield, CapCut)

- Write scroll-stopping hooks for unaware, problem aware, and solution aware audiences

- Build complete creative briefs for each concept — hook, script, visual direction, CTA

- Generate AI video shots using reference images and detailed prompts in Seedance / Higgsfield

- Edit and assemble final videos in CapCut: text overlays, pacing, music, subtitles

- Analyse performance data (hook rate, CTR, CPL) weekly and use it to improve the next batch

- Study competitor ads, winning creatives in adjacent industries, and emerging AI tools proactively

- Propose new hooks, angles, and formats without being asked — you bring ideas, not just execution

 

 

WHAT YOU MUST HAVE

 

- Proven experience creating performance video ads for Meta 
 / Instagram)

- Hands-on experience with AI video generation tools — Seedance, Kling, Runway, Higgsfield, or similar

- Strong understanding of direct response copywriting — hooks, problem/solution framing, CTAs

- Fast, clean video editing in CapCut or Premiere Pro

- Clear understanding of awareness stages — unaware, problem aware, solution aware

- Ability to read performance data and iterate based on what it tells you

- A portfolio of Meta ads you personally created — with context on the hook strategy and results

- Excellent written English (Dutch or German is a bonus, not required)

- Reliable internet connection, dedicated workspace, professional setup

 

 

WHAT MAKES YOU STAND OUT

 

- You have created winning Meta ads for e-commerce or lead generation brands with measurable results

- You understand the difference between brand content and performance content — and why it matters

- You prompt AI video tools effectively — you know how to get cinematic, on-brand results

- You study ads obsessively — you have a swipe file, you know what's working right now on Meta

- You think in systems — you don't just make one good ad, you build repeatable creative frameworks

- You move fast and deliver consistently without needing your hand held

 

 

THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF

 

- You need detailed step-by-step instructions for every single task

- You only edit — you don't think strategically about why an ad works or fails

- You've never studied direct response marketing, copywriting, or consumer psychology

- You treat AI tools as a shortcut to mediocre output instead of a creative instrument

- You deliver slowly and make excuses when you miss deadlines

- You've never looked at a Meta ad and thought about why it stops the scroll

 

 

COMPENSATION & GROWTH

 

- Base salary: $1200–$1,500 USD per month, depending on portfolio quality and experience

- Performance bonus: $25–$50 per winning ad — any creative that consistently generates leads above our target CPL

- Full-time, remote — work from anywhere

- Direct collaboration with the founder — no layers, no bureaucracy

- Clear growth path to Senior Creative Lead as the team scales across more markets and niches

- You will be the first creative hire — you shape the system, not just fill a role

 

 

HOW TO APPLY

 

Do not send a generic application. We will not review it.

 

To apply, send us all five of the following:

 

1. Three Meta ads you personally created — video or static. For each one, briefly explain: what the hook strategy was, who the target audience was, and what the results were (rough metrics are fine).

 

2. One AI video creative you have made using tools like Seedance, Kling, Runway, Higgsfield, or similar — any niche, any format. Share a link (Google Drive, Dropbox, or direct URL). This is the single most important part of your application — we want to see what you can actually produce.

 

3. Your answer to this question in maximum 5 sentences: "A bar owner in Amsterdam has never thought about getting a neon sign. Write the opening hook of a 30-second Meta video ad that stops their scroll."

 

4. A list of AI video tools you have hands-on experience with, and your honest assessment of which one currently produces the best results for product or lifestyle ads — and why.

 

5. One sentence only: what is the biggest mistake most brands make when creating Meta video ads?

 

Applications missing any of these five elements will not be reviewed — no exceptions.

 

 

WHAT WE'RE REALLY EVALUATING IN YOUR APPLICATION

 

The AI video sample is the most important filter. It tells us immediately whether you can produce at the level we need — cinematic quality, correct pacing, strong visual storytelling. A great hook answer with a weak video sample will not get you through.

 

The hook question is the second filter. Someone who writes:

 

"Stel je voor: jouw bar zit vol, de muziek staat aan — maar niemand maakt een foto. Weet je waarom?"

 

...thinks differently from someone who writes:

 

"Are you looking for a neon sign for your bar?"

 

The one-sentence question reveals whether you actually understand Meta advertising or are just executing tasks. The tools list tells us your current level. Together, these five elements give us a complete picture before we spend a single minute on a call.

title: SEO/GEO & Social Content Specialist
description:
The Role in a Nutshell

We are moving beyond the era of isolated blog posts. We’re looking for a multidisciplinary Content Specialist who understands that modern search happens everywhere - from Google and ChatGPT to the feeds of LinkedIn, Instagram, and
.

In this role, you won’t just be writing articles; you’ll be building a "search ecosystem." You’ll create high-authority web content that ranks, then atomise that expertise into high-performing social content that drives signals back to our site. If you know how to make a LinkedIn post trend while simultaneously optimising a site for Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO), you’re exactly who we’re looking for.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Cross-Platform Strategy: Write SEO-optimised web content and adapt it into platform-specific posts for LinkedIn,
, and Instagram to create a "surround sound" brand presence.

- GEO & Social Search: Optimise content for both AI search engines (like Perplexity) and "Social Search" (ensuring our Reels and posts surface when users search within social apps).

- On-Page Orchestration: Handle the technical creative work - crafting title tags, meta descriptions, and heading hierarchies that align with your social hooks.

- Content Atomization: Take one deep-dive research piece and turn it into a carousel for Instagram, a thought-leadership post for LinkedIn, and a structured FAQ for AI search.

- Direct Publishing: Manage the end-to-end flow, publishing directly into WordPress and scheduling social media via platforms like Buffer or Hootsuite.

- Brief Execution: Work from detailed briefs to ensure search intent is met across every touchpoint, hitting deadlines with clinical precision.



What You Bring to the Table

- Experience: 2+ years of professional writing experience covering both long-form SEO content and short-form social media copywriting.

- Linguistic Excellence: Native or near-native English. You can pivot your tone from "Authoritative Industry Expert" on a blog to "Engaging & Punchy" on Social.

- SEO & Social Fundamentals: A solid grasp of on-page SEO, plus an understanding of how social signals and engagement impact brand visibility.

- Technical Comfort: Familiarity with basic schema markup and the ability to navigate CMS platforms (WordPress/Webflow).

- AI Literacy: Experience using AI tools for research and content outlining to speed up your workflow without losing the "human touch."

- Visual Sense: A keen eye for how text and visuals play together on social feeds.



Bonus Points For 

- Design Skills: Ability to use Canva (or similar) to create high-quality social tiles or featured images.

- Platform Specialist: Knowledge of the LinkedIn algorithm, or Instagram's SEO features (alt text, keyword-rich captions), and other similar social systems.

- Code Lite: Basic HTML knowledge to fix formatting glitches.

- Local Touch: Familiarity with the Australian market and "Aussie" English nuances.



Why Join Us?

"We don't believe in content for content's sake. We believe in high-impact storytelling that captures attention in the feed and authority in the search results. You'll have the creative freedom to experiment across platforms and be at the forefront of the GEO revolution."



- Lead the Shift: You are starting at the ground floor. Be the person who defines how we merge Social and SEO into one powerhouse strategy.

- Creative Variety: No two days are the same - you'll be writing everything from technical whitepapers to viral-ready social threads.

- Modern Stack: Access to premium AI and diagnostic tools to help you work smarter, not harder.



How to Apply

Ready to dominate the search results and the feed? 



Please send your resume and a portfolio that includes:

- One long-form SEO blog post or article.

- Two or three examples of social media posts (LinkedIn/IG/FB) you’ve created for a brand.



Along with confirmation that you are:

- OK with screenshot capture software for time tracking;

- available during Sydney (AEST/AEDT) business hours (10am to 6pm);

- happy with an exclusive role (no paid or unpaid freelance work on the side);



Does your content rank on Google AND stop the scroll? We want to see it.

title: Amazon FBA Product Research Specialist (Data-Driven | Long-Term | Ongoing Work)
description:
Job Description:  

We are looking for a highly analytical and detail-oriented Amazon FBA Product Research Specialist to identify profitable private label product opportunities using data-driven methods.



This is a long-term position for someone who understands Amazon FBA deeply and can consistently find high-potential products—not random ideas.



You will be responsible for researching, analyzing, and presenting product opportunities that meet strict investment criteria.



---



Responsibilities:  

- Use tools like Helium 10 / Jungle Scout to find product opportunities  

- Apply advanced filters (revenue, competition, reviews, pricing)  

- Analyze Top 10 competitors for each product  

- Identify weaknesses in listings (images, reviews, branding, pricing)  

- Extract and summarize customer complaints from reviews  

- Estimate product cost from Alibaba (rough estimation is fine)  

- Calculate approximate profit margins  

- Suggest clear product differentiation/improvement ideas  

- Submit structured reports daily



---



Strict Product Criteria ( will be given later):  

---



Deliverables (Daily):  

You will submit 5–10 qualified product opportunities per day in the following format:



- Product Name  

- Amazon Link  

- Price  

- Monthly Revenue  

- Units Sold  

- Average Reviews (Top 10)  

- Competitor Weaknesses  

- Common Customer Complaints  

- Estimated Product Cost  

- Estimated Profit per Unit  

- Differentiation Idea  



---



Requirements:  

- Proven experience in Amazon FBA product research  

- Strong knowledge of Helium 10 or Jungle Scout  

- Ability to analyze data (not guesswork)  

- Understanding of private label business model  

- Ability to identify real opportunities vs saturated products  

- Good English communication  

- Attention to detail is critical  



---



Preferred (Strong Advantage):  

- Experience launching or managing Amazon products  

- Understanding of PPC basics and profitability  

- Experience sourcing from Alibaba  

- Ability to think like an investor, not just a researcher  



---



Compensation:  

- Monthly: $300 – $600 (based on experience)  

- Performance bonuses for successful product selections  

- Long-term opportunity with growth



---



Important:  

We are not looking for generic product lists.  

We are looking for someone who can identify profitable opportunities with clear reasoning.



If you understand what makes a product succeed on Amazon and can back it with data, apply now.

title: TikTok KOL Supervisor
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a dynamic and highly motivated KOL Manager to oversee and grow our TikTok influencer marketing efforts in Philippines. The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying, engaging, and managing relationships with TikTok influencers to drive brand awareness, engagement, and ultimately sales in the local market.

Key Responsibilities:

1. KOL Strategy Development:

  - Develop and implement a comprehensive TikTok KOL influencer strategy aligned with brand objectives, market trends, and consumer insights in Vietnam.

  - Create campaigns that drive engagement, brand awareness, and conversion, with clear KPIs and measurable outcomes.

2. KOL Research and Identification:

  - Identify and establish relationships with top-tier and micro-influencers in Vietnam who align with the brand’s values, target audience, and goals.

  - Stay up-to-date with TikTok trends and emerging influencers to ensure the brand is always at the forefront of the platform.

3. Campaign Execution & Management:

  - Oversee end-to-end influencer campaign execution, from briefing and content creation to final delivery and performance analysis.

  - Ensure influencers’ content aligns with brand guidelines, voice, and overall marketing strategy.

4. Collaboration and Negotiation:

  - Negotiate contracts, terms, and compensation with influencers and influencer agencies to ensure mutually beneficial partnerships.

  - Collaborate with internal teams (creative, PR, and marketing) to ensure influencer content is integrated seamlessly into the overall marketing strategy.

5. Performance Tracking and Reporting:

  - Monitor the performance of KOL campaigns on TikTok, track key metrics (engagement, reach, conversions), and optimize strategies accordingly.

  - Provide regular reports and insights to management on campaign effectiveness, ROI, and influencer impact.

6. Community Building:

  - Build and nurture long-term relationships with influencers to foster loyalty and repeat collaborations.

  - Engage in community management by interacting with influencers’ audiences and ensuring positive brand sentiment.

7. Market and Competitor Insights:

  - Monitor competitors' influencer strategies on TikTok and analyze trends in influencer marketing within Philippine’s digital landscape.

  - Use data and insights to continuously improve and adapt the influencer strategy.

Qualifications:

- Proven experience in influencer marketing or KOL management, ideally in the TikTok ecosystem, preferably within Philippines.

- Strong understanding of TikTok trends, features, and best practices.

- Excellent negotiation and communication skills.

- Creative mindset with an ability to think outside the box to create viral content.

- Fluent in English (both written and spoken).

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Preferred:

- Experience working with a brand in the lifestyle, fashion, or e-commerce industry.

- Existing network of TikTok influencers in Philippines.

title: Principal Operations Assistant (Service Delivery, Executive Support, Client Escalations): Weekly Pay & Growth Opportunit
description:
Hi there!



We're searching for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Principal Operations Assistant (Service Delivery, Executive Support, Client Escalations) to join our remote team. 



This remote position offers an exciting opportunity for you to contribute to our client's success while enjoying the freedom and flexibility of a work-from-home lifestyle.



If you're passionate about helping others succeed and want to grow your career in a dynamic and supportive environment, then read on…







== WHY WORK WITH US ==



Make a Difference at Pro Sulum: An Award-Winning Company Where You Matter.



We're not just about accolades (like being on the Inc. 5000 list) - we're about empowering our team to create real impact. At Pro Sulum, your contributions matter, and your unique talents are valued. Join a company that fosters personal growth, celebrates individuality, and champions success for all.





-> Benefits:

 * Competitive salary (Php 30,000 to Php 40,000) depending on experience

 * Pay Increase Opportunity Every 6 Months

 * Weekly Pay

 * Paid Service Incentive Leaves

 * Monthly Incentives

 * Referral Incentives

 * Virtual Company Events

 * Dynamic, fun, and supportive team

 * Full-time role as an independent contractor (not BPO)

 * Long-term opportunity with career growth and advancement





== THE POSITION ==



As the Principal Operations Assistant for a consultancy and strategic partner company, you’ll play a key role in keeping daily operations running smoothly and ensuring high-quality service delivery.



Your primary focus will include managing ticket workflows, enforcing SLA standards, handling client escalations, and maintaining clear, accurate documentation. You’ll also support executive operations, coordinate across teams, and assist with basic reporting and operational tracking.



You’ll work closely with leadership, clients, and internal teams to ensure accountability, clear communication, and consistent execution. If you’re organized, proactive, and confident in managing operations in a fast-paced environment, this role offers strong growth potential.





-> Requirements:

• Strong operations or service delivery experience, ideally within a managed services, IT, or similar environment.

• Proven ability to manage workflows, enforce processes, and make independent operational decisions.

• Excellent communication skills with the ability to handle escalations, set expectations, and coordinate across teams and clients.

• Experience with PSA tools (e.g., Autotask) and general familiarity with ticketing systems and SLA management.

• High level of organization, accountability, and attention to detail in fast-paced environments.

• Ability to analyze operational and basic financial data and surface insights to leadership.

• Technically proficient enough to understand and triage IT, networking, or service-related issues.

• Available to work full-time (40 hrs/wk).

• Can work during standard US business hours.

• Fast, stable internet connection (Minimum download speed 10 Mbps).

• Working computer/laptop (Minimum Requirement: Processor - Intel i5 or equivalent, RAM - 8GB).

• Backup power source or work location for power outages.





-> Nice to Have:

• Experience with tools such as Autotask, QuickBooks, MS Excel, Slack, and other service or project management platforms.

• Background in managed IT services, cybersecurity, or ISP-related environments.

• Experience supporting executives, managing calendars, inboxes, or client communications.

• Familiarity with basic financial reporting, reconciliation, and vendor coordination.





-> Responsibilities:

Duties and Responsibilities include but are not limited to:

• Oversee PSA and ticket operations, ensuring proper prioritization, SLA adherence, documentation quality, and overall workflow discipline

• Act as the primary escalation point for service and customer issues, ensuring timely resolution and clear communication

• Provide operational leadership and guidance to service coordination, balancing priorities, capacity, and client expectations

• Monitor performance trends, identify workflow or resourcing issues, and recommend improvements to leadership

• Support operational and financial tracking, including basic reporting, data reconciliation, and vendor or order coordination

• Manage executive support functions such as calendar, inbox, reporting, and client/vendor communication

• Ensure consistent follow-through on tasks, deadlines, and deliverables across teams

• Coordinate logistics, assets, and documentation to support smooth day-to-day operations across the business





-> About You:

For this position, the successful candidate will have/be:

* High Attention to Detail: You are accurate, consistent, and thorough in your work. 

* Dependable & Trustworthy: You complete tasks on time and follow through on your commitments.

* Resourceful & Proactive: You tackle challenges head-on and solve problems independently.

* Great Communicator: You excel in both written and verbal English communication.





== HOW TO APPLY ==



Ready to join us? Apply now and unlock your future with Pro Sulum!



If you are interested in this position and believe you have the qualities listed above to be successful, please complete this Google Form and FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS carefully.



APPLY HERE >>>



 - Due to the high volume of applications we receive, only candidates selected for further consideration will be contacted to move forward in the hiring process.

 - If you're a good fit for the role, you'll receive an
 from the Pro Sulum Recruitment Team within 1-2 weeks.



Congratulations on taking the first step towards a rewarding career with Pro Sulum! We're excited to learn more about you and explore the possibility of you joining our team.

title: Creative Static Designer for Paid Ads (ROAS-Driven)
description:
APPLY HERE:



About Us



We are a fast-growing brand specializing in premium hair accessories, with a strong focus on creative performance marketing.

Our creative team builds and tests high-performing ad campaigns on Meta platforms 
 & Instagram), and we are now looking for a talented performance-driven graphic designer to join our team and help us scale.



Job Description



We are looking for a Performance Ad Designer who knows how to design scroll-stopping, conversion-focused visuals for Meta ads.



You will collaborate closely with our Creative Strategists to transform ideas into impactful static creatives that drive clicks, engagement, and sales.



Your Responsibilities



- Design high-performing static ads optimized for Meta platforms 
 & Instagram)

- Create multiple visual variations

- Adapt each design to different placements

- Maintain an organized asset library and deliver layered source files

- Continuously improve visual performance based on test results and feedback



Required Experience & Skills



- 1+ year experience designing ads for Meta platforms 
, Instagram)

- Portfolio showcasing high-performing ad creatives (ideally for e-commerce brands)

- Strong understanding of direct response design (hierarchy, CTA visibility, ad copy structure)

- Excellent sense of layout, typography, and brand consistency

- Ability to balance speed and quality under tight deadlines

- Organized, responsive, and detail-oriented



Nice to Have



- Familiarity with metrics like CTR, CPC, CPA, and ROAS

- Understanding of what makes an ad perform (visual hook, clarity, emotion, CTA, etc.)



Our Working Process



- Daily communication via Slack & Notion

- Clear creative briefs for each concept

- Constructive feedback loop focused on improving performance

- Collaborative team spirit and data-driven mindset

- Evaluation based on creative performance and deadlines



Before You Apply



This role is not for branding or content designers — it’s for creatives who understand paid ads and conversion psychology.

Please apply only if you have prior experience creating ad creatives for Meta or similar paid social platforms.



APPLY HERE:

title: US Payroll Specialist
description:
We are seeking an experienced Payroll Specialist to support payroll processing for clients of our accounting firm. This is not an internal HR payroll role. Instead, this person will help manage payroll across a variety of client accounts, ensuring payroll is processed accurately, on time, and with a high level of responsiveness and professionalism.



The ideal candidate has prior experience handling payroll within an accounting firm environment and is comfortable working across multiple clients, deadlines, and payroll systems. Experience with QuickBooks Desktop Payroll, QuickBooks Online Payroll, and/or third-party payroll platforms is required.



This role is a strong fit for someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, moves quickly, and produces accurate work with minimal oversight.



Key Responsibilities

Process and support payroll for multiple client accounts accurately and on time

Manage payroll workflows across platforms such as QuickBooks Desktop, QuickBooks Online, and third-party payroll software

Review payroll data for accuracy, including hours, pay rates, deductions, and payroll changes



Monitor payroll deadlines and ensure all client payrolls are completed on schedule

Troubleshoot payroll issues and resolve discrepancies in a timely manner



Communicate with internal tea
mbers and clients clearly and professionally regarding payroll items, missing information, and next steps



Maintain organized payroll records and supporting documentation



Assist with payroll-related reporting, reconciliations, and follow-up items as needed



Escalate issues appropriately while also bringing practical solutions



Handle sensitive employee and client information with confidentiality and care



Required Qualifications

Experience as a Payroll Specialist within an accounting firm is required



Experience managing payroll for multiple clients rather than a single internal company payroll



Hands-on experience with QuickBooks Desktop Payroll, QuickBooks Online Payroll, and/or third-party payroll platforms



Strong understanding of payroll processing, payroll deadlines, and common payroll issues



Strong written and spoken English communication skills



Ability to work during U.S. business hours, with ET preferred



Strong attention to detail and commitment to accuracy



Reliable follow-through and ability to work independently in a remote environment





What We Are Looking For



Own It

Takes responsibility for deadlines, follow-up, and outcomes

Follows through without being chased

Brings solutions when issues arise

Can manage recurring payroll work with consistency and accountability



Lead With Value and Clarity

Communicates clearly with both clients and internal tea
mbers

Makes requests, updates, and explanations easy to understand

Keeps work organized and actionable

Helps reduce confusion rather than create it



Speed and Accuracy

Works quickly without sacrificing quality

Meets payroll deadlines consistently

Produces careful work with minimal mistakes or rework

Responds promptly and stays on top of moving pieces across multiple clients





Why This Role Matters

Payroll is one of the most important recurring services we provide to clients. The right person in this role will help clients feel taken care of, help the internal team operate more smoothly, and ensure payroll is handled with the urgency and accuracy it requires.

title: B2B Appointment Setter / Outbound SDR (LinkedIn + Cold Email) | SME and Accounting Firms
description:
I am the founder of Onwards Capita, a fractional CFO and finance execution firm helping SMEs improve cash visibility, working capital discipline, and short-term financial control.

I am hiring one disciplined outbound SDR / appointment setter based in the Philippines to help me generate qualified meetings.

This is not a strategy role.

This is not a closing role.

This is not a content-writing role.

I will provide:

• the target personas

• the outreach strategy

• the message scripts

• the one-pagers / sales material

• the qualification logic



Your role is to execute with discipline:

• identify the right targets

• run outbound on LinkedIn and cold

• follow up consistently

• manage replies and booking flow

• keep the CRM and tracking clean



Scope split

• 80% of your work: outreach to SME founders / decision-makers for a cash control / liquidity offer

• 20% of your work: outreach to accounting firm partners in Singapore and Malaysia for an early-stage pilot offer



What you will do

• Build and verify targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other approved tools

• Identify decision-makers in our target markets and ICPs

• Run structured outbound sequences across:

o LinkedIn connection requests and follow-ups

o cold
 outreach and follow-ups

• Manage responses and keep communication professional, concise and accurate

• Handle basic replies using our pre-approved frameworks

• Escalate nuanced conversations to me

• Push qualified prospects to book a 10–15 minute intro call on my calendar

• Keep records clean in our CRM / tracker

• Report clearly on:

o prospects added

o touches sent

o positive replies

o meetings booked

o meetings held

o pipeline quality



Important

You will not use my personal LinkedIn account.

You will conduct LinkedIn outreach from your own professional profile and use a company
 address for cold
.



Ideal profile

You are a good fit if:

• You have real experience booking B2B meetings through LinkedIn and cold

• Your written English is strong and professional

• You are comfortable reaching out to founders, partners, recruiters, and senior decision-makers

• You know how to research and target properly instead of blasting low-quality lists

• You are organized, responsive, and reliable

• You understand CRM hygiene and follow-up discipline

• You do not need hand-holding every day

Strong advantage if you have

• Experience in B2B SaaS, financial services, consulting, accounting, or high-ticket services

• Experience prospecting Singapore, Malaysia, or US-based businesses

• Experience using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, HubSpot, Zoho, or similar tools



Contract structure

• initial 4-week paid test engagement

• 20–25 hours/week

• If performance is strong, this will become a longer-term retainer

Compensation

• Base during 4-week trial: $400–$600/month equivalent, depending on experience, quality, and availability

• Hours: roughly 20–25 hours/week to start

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified meeting held

• Bonus: $200 for each SME client you sourced that signs and pays the first invoice

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified accounting firm partner meeting held

• Bonus: $300 when an accounting firm enters into a formal pilot contract discussion 



What success looks like

In the first 4 weeks, I expect:

• disciplined execution

• strong targeting quality

• clean tracking

• professional communication

• steady follow-up

• qualified meetings, not junk meetings



To apply

Start your application with the words: CASHCONTROL

Then include the following:

1. A short summary of your outbound experience

2. Which tools you have used: Sales Navigator, Apollo, Lemlist, Instantly, HubSpot, Zoho, etc.

3. Two examples of B2B outbound messages you personally sent that led to a booked meeting

4. Which geographies and seniority levels you have prospected before

5. Your availability over the next 4 weeks

6. Your expected monthly compensation for a 20–25 hour/week trial

Low-effort, generic applications will be ignored.

title: Operations & Marketing Coordinator
description:
We Breathe Success (WBS) is an Australian breathwork and mindset transformation brand. 



We have transformed 50,000+ lives, sold out 35 live events globally, and are now launching our certification program and international world tour. 



We move fast, we do big things, and we need the right person to run operations behind the scenes so our founder can focus on growth.



This is a full-time, long-term role. We hire for keeps.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Growth & Scaling



Build, manage, and optimise sales funnels from top of funnel to conversion

Set up and maintain automations across GHL,
, and social platforms

Identify growth opportunities and bring forward new ideas to scale the business

Track KPIs, conversion rates, and pipeline metrics report weekly with recommendations

Help launch new programs, events, and offers end to end

Support Meta ad campaigns — asset preparation, audience setup, and performance tracking

Constantly look for smarter, faster, better ways to do things — and implement them



AI & Automation — This Is a Core Part of the Role



Use AI tools daily to generate content, build systems, solve problems, and move faster

Expert level with Claude (Anthropic) — including Claude Code and Claude Cowork

Use AI to come up with new ideas, strategies, and growth opportunities for the business

Build and manage AI-powered automations that save time and scale operations

Bonus if you can set up and configure AI agents

We expect you to bring AI thinking to every part of the business — not just use it when asked



Operations & Admin



Manage founder's inbox, calendar, and daily schedule

Handle weekly live masterclass registrations, Zoom links, reminders, and replays

Manage GHL CRM — contacts, pipelines, automations, and lead tracking

Onboard new clients into our certification and mentorship programs

Draft
s and communications on behalf of the founder

Coordinate with speakers, contractors, and the team



Graphics & Content



Create on-brand Canva graphics for social media, events,
s, and ads

Produce slide decks, workbooks, and promotional assets

Maintain brand consistency across all platforms (black, gold, white)

Manage and organise the content library



Events & World Tour



Coordinate speaker communications and event logistics

Manage event registrations and attendee communications

Build event runsheets and briefing documents

Handle post-event follow-up and replay distribution



Social Media



Schedule and post content on Instagram and

Monitor DMs and comments, flag leads to the founder

Track masterclass funnel performance and report weekly





WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

You must have:



3+ years experience as a VA, OBM, Operations Manager, or Growth Coordinator

A proven track record of helping businesses grow — not just maintaining, actively scaling

Experience building and optimising sales funnels and automation systems

Expert-level AI skills — especially Claude, Claude Code, and Claude Cowork

Strong Canva skills — you produce professional graphics without hand-holding

Excellent written English

Experience inside a coaching, events, or online business

A proactive mindset — you bring solutions, not problems

Reliable internet and a professional home setup



Big advantage if you have:



GHL (Go High Level) CRM experience — funnels, automations, pipelines, and campaigns

Experience scaling an online business or personal brand from 6 to 7 figures

Ability to set up and configure AI agents

Experience supporting a high-growth events or coaching business

Basic video editing skills

Passion for personal development or wellness





THE KIND OF PERSON WE WANT

You are fast. You are confident. You do not wait to be told what to do — you look at the business, see what needs to happen, and make it happen. You have helped companies grow before and you have the receipts to prove it. You understand funnels, automations, and scaling levers. You are obsessed with AI and use it every single day to think smarter, move faster, and come up with ideas nobody else is thinking of. You take ownership. You communicate clearly and proactively. You thrive in a fast-moving environment and you love the challenge of keeping a high-growth business organised and on track.

If you are cautious, slow, or need constant direction — this is not the right role. If you are sharp, results-driven, AI-savvy, and hungry to be part of building something world-class — we want to hear from you.



HOW TO APPLY



A short video (2–3 minutes) — introduce yourself and tell us why you want this role

Your CV or resume

Tell us which AI tools you use daily and exactly how you use them

2–3 Canva graphics examples you have created

Describe a time you came up with a new idea or growth opportunity and made it happen



Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Sales Specialist
description:
IEVA is Hiring: Sales Closer (Philippines)

We’re looking for a strong closer who delivers results, hits KPIs, and thrives in a fast?moving, global environment.

At IEVA, we work with students and professionals across 20+ countries — and we need someone who can match our pace, energy, and standards. This role is for someone who doesn’t wait to be told what to do. You move, you follow up, you close.



What You’ll Do

- Convert warm leads into paid clients

- Hit and exceed monthly KPIs

- Follow structured sales scripts and closing frameworks

- Create smart, strategic follow?ups that drive urgency

- Manage conversations across WhatsApp, Messenger, and calls

- Maintain clean, accurate notes and updates

- Work closely with our global team to improve conversion rates



Who We’re Looking For

- A strong closer with proven sales experience

- KPI?driven and competitive

- Fast responder — minutes, not hours

- Confident English communication

- Creative in messaging, follow?ups, and objection handling

- Comfortable asking for payment and securing commitment

- Thrives under pressure and targets

- Experience in BPO sales, real estate, insurance, or education is a big advantage



What You Get

- Competitive base salary

- High commissions for every closed client

- Work with an international team

- Clear KPIs, clear expectations, and fast growth opportunities

- A role where performance is rewarded — not seniority



If you believe you’re the right person for this role, tell us why you should be selected and attach your updated resume. We want to hear what makes you a strong closer and how you’ve achieved your KPIs in the past.

title: Sales Intern(KPI based only)
description:
Immigration Education Visa Agency

Headquarters: Philippines

Global Head Office: Australia

Employment Type: Intern with potential upgrade to Part-time & Full-time positions.



Location: Remote

Duration: 3–6 months internship (with potential transition to part-time or full-time employment based on performance, which would include standard employment benefits and monthly travel allowance in addition to commission.)

Compensation: Intern potential salary, ?10,000 to ?20,000>(Uncapped bonus). After probation potential salary ??25,000–??40,000 monthly (performance-based)





About the Role

We are seeking a driven and results-oriented Sales Intern to join our growing team in the education consulting sector. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in sales, enjoys building relationships, and is motivated by performance-based growth.

As a Referral Consultant, you will play a key role in generating leads, building partnerships, and supporting students and families in their journey toward overseas education opportunities.



Key Responsibilities

- Lead Generation: Cold calling, prospecting, and qualifying potential clients.

- Client Engagement: Setting up meetings with education consultants and prospective students.

- Partnership Development: Building and maintaining relationships with schools, agencies, and service providers.

- Sales Performance: Achieving monthly targets and delivering measurable results.

- Reporting: Tracking leads, conversions, and performance metrics.

- Collaboration: Working closely with the operations and marketing teams to maximize outreach.



What We’re Looking For

- Strong sales acumen with proven ability to deliver results.

- Experience with KIP (Key Industry Partners) or similar frameworks is highly valued.

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

- Self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently.

- Comfortable with cold calling and initiating conversations with new prospects.

- Passion for education and empowering students to achieve their goals.



Growth & Benefits

- Career Pathway: Internship (3–6 months) ?Part
-time employment based on performance.

- Generous monthly bonus

- Paid travel and Monthly allowance





How to Apply

If you are ambitious, results-driven, and ready to grow with us, we’d love to hear from you!

Send your CV and a short video introduction.

title: We're Hiring: AI Video Ad Producer & Director
description:
Fully Remote | Hourly Rate (Open) | Start ASAP



AI video is the future of advertising — and we're already building it.



We run a high-output AI video ad production operation for e-commerce brands, and we need someone who can direct scenes, engineer prompts, and deliver across multiple formats — Amazon ads, social media, reels, UGC, and more.



---



THE ROLE:

AI Video Director & Prompt Engineer



You're not just pushing buttons — you're directing. You'll shape the visual language of every piece of content we produce: the mood, the framing, the story. Then you'll engineer the prompts to make it happen — across a variety of formats and platforms.



CONTENT YOU'LL CREATE:

- Amazon & e-commerce product video ads

-
, Instagram & TikTok social media ads

- Short-form reels built for scroll-stopping performance

- UGC-style videos that feel authentic and convert

- Cinematic brand storytelling clips



YOUR TOOLKIT MIGHT INCLUDE:

- Seedance 2.0 / Kling AI / Runway / Pika

- ElevenLabs (voiceover integration)

- Frame continuity techniques (last-frame-to-first-frame, character consistency, etc.)

- A director's instinct for pacing, composition, and platform-native storytelling



???? YOU ARE:

- Experienced with AI video generation tools (not just ChatGPT)

- A visual thinker who directs with intention

- Platform-savvy — you know what works on Amazon vs. TikTok vs. Instagram

- Prompt-obsessed — you iterate fast and think in scenes

- Self-directed — you deliver without hand-holding

- Available for ongoing work with room to grow



---



HOW THIS WORKS:

• This is an hourly rate position — tell us what you're looking for

• Your rate will be determined based on your experience and output quality

• The first month is a paid trial — a chance for both of us to make sure it's the right fit

• Strong performers get consistent, ongoing work across multiple content types



---



Let's build something cinematic. ????



D
 with:

• Tools you've used + experience level

• Sample work — anything you've directed or produced with AI

• Your expected hourly rate

• Your weekly availability

title: Hand-Drawn Illustrator + Video Editor for YouTube Explainer Channel
description:
# Hand-Drawn Illustrator + Video Editor for YouTube Explainer Channel ($75/video)



## About Us

We run a YouTube explainer channel that breaks down finance, business, and current-affairs stories in a simple, entertaining, hand-drawn cartoon style.



Channel (drawing style reference): 



Please watch 1 or 2 videos before applying so you understand the look and feel we want to keep consistent.



## What You'll Do

You will take our script + voiceover + drawing guide and turn it into a finished, upload-ready YouTube video. Per video, you will handle the full pipeline:



1. Check and clean the voiceover audio (remove noise, level volume, fix pacing).

2. Hand-draw all characters, objects, props, and key visual elements in our existing style (solid lines, flat colors, simple stick-figure-style characters).

3. Put everything together in video editing software — timing the illustrations to the voiceover, adding simple motion, transitions, and on-screen text.

4. Deliver a final video in .MP4 or .MOV (1080p minimum).



## What We Provide

- Full written script

- Recorded voiceover

- Drawing guide / shot-by-shot scene plan (tells you what to draw per scene)



## Strict Style Rules

- Characters, props, and objects MUST be hand-drawn (digital drawing is fine — Procreate, Photoshop, Clip Studio, Krita, etc.).

- AI generation is ONLY allowed for backgrounds, and those AI backgrounds must match our existing style (solid color or simple flat scenes).

- No stock footage, no generic cartoon packs, no clip-art characters.

- Keep line weight, color palette, and character proportions consistent with our channel.



## Video Specs

- Length: 10–15 minutes per video

- Resolution: 1080p minimum

- Format: .MP4 or .MOV



## Turnaround

- 3–5 days per video from the time we send the script, voiceover, and drawing guide.



## Rate

- $75 USD per finished video (PayPal fees already included — we pay this flat amount via PayPal).

- Paid upon final delivery and approval.

- Ongoing work — we post regularly, so this can become a steady weekly gig if we work well together.



## Who We're Looking For

- Filipino freelancer with strong illustration skills AND video editing skills (or a small team that covers both).

- Can match an existing drawing style closely — this is the most important skill.

- Comfortable with Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, or similar.

- Reliable internet, own computer and drawing tablet, and can hit the 3–5 day deadline every time.

- Basic English — enough to read our scripts and notes.

- Takes feedback well and can do small revisions.



## How to Apply

Please send the following. Incomplete applications will be skipped.



1. A short intro about yourself and your setup (software, tablet, internet speed).

2. Portfolio — 2 to 3 samples of hand-drawn illustration work AND 1 to 2 samples of video editing work (YouTube links or Google Drive links are fine).

3. Paid test sample: Draw ONE character in our style (reference: our channel) — a simple stick-figure-style person wearing a suit, holding a phone. Send as PNG with transparent background. We will pay ?200 for the test drawing whether or not we hire you.

4. Your available start date and how many videos per week you can commit to.



Subject line when applying: **"Illustrator + Editor — [Your Name]"**



We'll reply within 3–5 days to shortlisted applicants.



Thanks — looking forward to working with you.

title: Revit Families Modeler
description:
Company: RD Studio (rdstudio.co)

Employment Type: Full-Time Freelance

Location: Remote (Targeting APAC / Southeast Asia)



RD Studio is an international BIM content company known for high-quality Revit families used by thousands of architects worldwide. We are expanding our team and looking for a Revit Family Modeler who specializes in complex, highly parametric content.



(Note: We are specifically looking for advanced modelers. If you are a beginner or only build basic geometry without nested parameters, this role is not for you).





? What You’ll Do

- Build complex parametric content: Create professional, lightweight Revit families from scratch using nested families, complex formulas, and advanced constraints.

- Maintain strict quality: Follow our internal BIM standards for geometry, parameters, materials, and visibility.

- Draft diverse assets: Work on furniture, plumbing fixtures, lighting, electrical, structural, and more.

- Collaborate efficiently: Manage your workflow using Asana, Google Sheets, and shared QA checklists.



???? What We’re Looking For

- Advanced Parametric Experience: Proven ability to build highly flexible families (portfolio and .RFA samples are required).

- Technical Mastery: Deep understanding of shared parameters, reference planes, type catalogs, and mathematical/logical formulas.

- Professional Organization: Ability to structure and name parameters cleanly and logically.

- Work Ethic: Strong attention to detail, proactive problem-solving, and comfortable with English documentation.

- Bonus: Experience modeling MEP or Structural content.





???? Why Join Us?

100% Remote: Work from home with flexible hours.

Skill Growth: Get consistent feedback from industry experts to elevate your BIM skills.

Career Progression: Long-term collaboration with the potential to grow into a Senior Modeler or QA Leadership role.





???? Location & Budget

This full-time freelance position is targeted toward candidates based in Southeast Asia (Philippines, Thailand, Myanmar, etc.), as our budget is benchmarked to competitive full-time freelance rates in these regions.





???? How to Apply

Send an
 to 
 with the subject: Revit Family Modeler — [Your Name]





Please include:

1. A short introduction about your experience with complex parametric modeling.

2. Your portfolio (PDF or link).

3. At least 5 sample Revit families (.RFA format) demonstrating your highest level of parametric complexity.

4. Your current availability for full-time work.

title: Real Estate Acquisition Specialist - Cold Calling (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
About Us



We're a real estate investment company in Phoenix, Arizona that buys distressed and off-market properties. We wholesale, fix & flip, and hold rental properties. We're growing fast and need a dedicated acquisition specialist to be the engine of our lead generation.



This is NOT a "try it for a week" gig. We're looking for someone who wants a stable, long-term position with a company that treats their team well. You'll be trained, supported, and rewarded for performance.



What You'll Do Every Day



- Cold call 100-150 property owners per day using a power dialer (we provide the dialer)

- Follow our proven call scripts to identify motivated sellers

- Qualify leads using our framework (we train you on this)

- Skip trace property owner contact info using our software (we provide access)

- Pull motivated seller lists weekly: pre-foreclosure, probate, tax delinquent, vacant properties

- Follow up with warm leads on a set schedule (no lead gets forgotten)

- Reach out to hard money lenders and attorneys to build referral partnerships

- Update HubSpot CRM with every call, every conversation, every lead - no exceptions

- Send a daily activity report at the end of each shift

- Send a weekly pipeline report every Friday



What We're Looking For



MUST HAVE:

- Clear, confident spoken English (you WILL be on the phone with Americans all day)

- Real estate cold calling experience - wholesaling, lead gen, or investor acquisitions

- Experience with CRM systems (HubSpot preferred, or Podio, GoHighLevel, similar)

- Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace with no background noise

- Headset with noise cancellation

- Self-motivated - you don't need someone checking on you every hour

- Comfortable with rejection (most people will say no - that's normal)

- Honest and dependable - if something isn't working, tell us, don't hide it



NICE TO HAVE (not required):

- Experience with skip tracing tools (Deal Sauce, BatchLeads, PropStream)

- Experience with power dialers (BatchDialer, ReadyMode, CallTools, Mojo)

- Understanding of US real estate wholesaling process

- Experience pulling lists from county public records



What You Get



- $900-1,100/month base pay (paid bi-monthly via Wise or PayPal - your choice)

- $100 bonus for every deal that closes from your leads

- Paid training - we don't throw you in blind, we walk you through everything

- All tools and software provided (dialer, skip tracing, CRM, lists)

- Scripts and frameworks provided - you're not guessing what to say

- Stable, long-term position - we're not hiring to fire in 30 days

- Growth opportunity - as we scale, you grow with us (team lead, higher pay)



How to Apply



Do NOT send a generic "I am a hardworking VA" message. We will ignore it.



Instead, reply with:



1. A 1-2 minute voice recording introducing yourself (upload to Google Drive or Vocaroo and share the link). Tell us your name, your RE experience, and why you want this role. This is how we evaluate your English and phone presence.



2. Answer these 3 questions:

- How many cold calls have you made per day in your most recent role?

- Have you used HubSpot? What other CRM and dialer tools have you used?

- A homeowner says "I'm not interested" - what do you say next?



3. Your expected monthly salary in USD.



If you follow these instructions, you're already ahead of 90% of applicants.



IMPORTANT NOTES



- This role is PHONE-HEAVY. If you don't like being on the phone, this isn't for you.

- We track call volume daily. 100+ dials is the minimum, not a suggestion.

- We value honesty over perfection. If you don't know something, say so. We'll train you.

- We're a small company that operates like a team, not a corporation. Your input matters.



We're ready to hire fast. If you're the right person, you could start this week.

title: Graphic Designer (Print on Demand / Printify Experience Required)
description:
**Job Title:** Graphic Designer (Print on Demand / Printify Experience Required)



**Location:** Remote

**Type:** Full-Time / Part-Time (Flexible)

**Compensation:** Competitive (based on experience)



---



### **About the Role**



We’re looking for a highly skilled Graphic Designer with strong experience in Print on Demand (POD), specifically using Printify. You’ll be responsible for creating high-converting, trend-driven designs for products like t-shirts, hoodies, mugs, and more across platforms such as Etsy, Amazon, and eBay.



This is not just a design role — we need someone who understands what sells.



---



### **Key Responsibilities**



* Create original, high-quality designs for POD products (apparel, accessories, etc.)

* Translate trends, niches, and customer intent into sellable designs

* Prepare print-ready files (correct dimensions, DPI, transparent backgrounds)

* Upload and manage designs in Printify (mockups, product setup, variants)

* Collaborate with the team on product launches and seasonal campaigns

* Optimize designs based on performance data and feedback



---



### **Requirements**



* Proven experience in Print on Demand (especially Printify)

* Strong portfolio showcasing POD designs (t-shirts preferred)

* Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop, or similar tools

* Understanding of typography, layout, and color theory for apparel

* Ability to follow brand guidelines while still being creative

* Knowledge of trending niches (e.g., humor, pets, professions, hobbies)

* Experience designing for Etsy/Amazon is a strong plus



---



### **Nice to Have**



* Experience with bulk design creation and scaling collections

* Basic knowledge of trademark and copyright compliance

* Familiarity with AI-assisted design tools (Midjourney, DALL·E, etc.)

* Experience with listing optimization (titles, tags, mockups)



---



### **What We’re Looking For**



* Fast, reliable, and detail-oriented

* Can produce designs that are not just “nice” but sell

* Takes ownership and works with minimal supervision

* Open to feedback and iteration



---



### **To Apply**



Please submit:



1. Portfolio (especially POD/t-shirt designs)

2. A brief intro about your experience with Printify

3. (Optional) Links to live stores or products you’ve worked on



---



**Bonus:** Shortlisted candidates may be asked to complete a paid test task.



---



We’re building a high-performance POD team — if you know how to create designs that convert, we want to hear from you.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Tracking Implementation Specialist (GTM & Conversion Tracking)
description:
Tracking Implementation Specialist (GTM & Conversion Tracking)

Work with developers when needed to ensure accurate tracking deployment



Google Ads Conversion Tracking

Ensure proper attribution within Google Ads reporting

Regularly test and troubleshoot tracking issues



Call Tracking Integration

Ensure dynamic number insertion (DNI) is functioning correctly

Track and validate call-based conversions across platforms

Maintain clear documentation of all implementations and updates



Collaboration

Requirements

Experience implementing CallRail or similar call tracking tools

Familiarity with Google Analytics

Basic understanding of HTML/JavaScript is a plus

Experience using debugging tools (Tag Assistant, GTM Preview, browser dev tools)

Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills

Good communication skills and ability to manage multiple tasks

Must be available full-time (9 AM – 5 PM Mountain Time)

How to Apply



Please include your resume and highlight any relevant experience with:



Google Tag Manager

Google Ads conversion tracking

CallRail or similar call tracking tools

title: Medical Biller
description:
Medical Biller (Dermatology & Oculoplastics – Remote)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

Schedule: US business hours (Eastern Time preferred)

Pay: Competitive, based on experience

About Us

We are a physician-owned medical practice in the United States specializing in dermatology, Mohs surgery, and oculoplastic surgery. We are a fast-growing, high-quality clinic focused on excellent patient care and efficient operations.

Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced Medical Biller with strong knowledge of US medical billing to manage claims, reduce denials, and improve collections. Experience with procedural and surgical billing is highly preferred.

Key Responsibilities

Submit accurate and timely insurance claims (CMS-1500)

Review and verify CPT, ICD-10, and modifiers

Handle billing for dermatology (visits, biopsies, excisions), Mohs surgery (17311–17315), repairs and closures, and oculoplastic procedures (blepharoplasty, lesion removals, etc.)

Post payments and reconcile accounts

Follow up on denied, rejected, and unpaid claims

Work insurance AR and aging reports

Identify patterns in denials and suggest improvements

Communicate with insurance companies (phone and portals)

Ensure compliance with US billing regulations

Required Experience

2+ years of US medical billing experience

Strong knowledge of CPT, ICD-10, and modifiers (-25, -59, -79, etc.)

Experience with claims submission and denial management

Experience with Medicare and commercial payers

Ability to work independently and manage workload

Strongly Preferred

Experience in dermatology and/or Mohs surgery billing

Experience with oculoplastic surgery billing (not general ophthalmology)

Understanding of global periods and surgical packages

Experience with high-value procedural claims

Experience with EMR systems (Modernizing Medicine / EMA is a plus)

Requirements

Excellent attention to detail

Strong English communication skills

Reliable high-speed internet

Quiet, professional work environment

Ability to work during US business hours

What Success Looks Like

Clean claims with low denial rates

Fast follow-up on unpaid claims

Improved collections and reduced AR days

Organized and proactive communication

How to Apply

Please include:

Your resume

A short summary of your medical billing experience

Your experience with dermatology, Mohs, or oculoplastics billing

Your internet speed

Your expected hourly rate

Include the phrase “CLEAN CLAIMS FIRST” in your application so we know you read this post.

Why Join Us

Stable, long-term role

Work with a high-level US specialty clinic

Opportunity to grow and take ownership of billing

)

or scaling existing accounts significantly
