title: LinkedIn Engagement and Community Specialist
description:
Role Overview:



We are seeking a 
munity Manager with a proven track record to lead and enhance our social media presence on LinkedIn. This role is pivotal in driving brand visibility, fostering meaningful engagement, and contributing to business growth. You will work closely with our content and copywriting teams to transform content into engaging LinkedIn posts, strategically incorporating tags, hashtags, and other platform-specific features. If you are looking for a traditional "lead generation" role, this position is not for you.



Key Responsibilities:

Strategic Content Management: Collaborate with our content and copywriting teams to adapt and optimise content for LinkedIn, ensuring posts are engaging and aligned with our strategic goals. This includes selecting appropriate tags, hashtags, and other LinkedIn features to maximise reach and impact.

Engagement and Community Building: Actively engage with new and existing audiences by initiating conversations, tagging relevant individuals and organisations, and fostering meaningful interactions that drive brand awareness and community growth.

Trend Monitoring and Adaptation: Stay ahead of industry trends and LinkedIn platform updates, using insights to recommend new strategies and content formats that keep our brand relevant and engaging.

Performance Analysis: Regularly track and analyse LinkedIn metrics, providing actionable insights and reports to refine our content strategy and optimise engagement.

Collaborative Integration: Work seamlessly with internal teams to ensure LinkedIn initiatives align with broader marketing strategies, contributing to the overall success of our campaigns.

Profile Optimisation: Continuously review and optimise LinkedIn profiles to maximise visibility, reach, and impact across all our LinkedIn activities.

Responsive Communication: Manage inquiries and feedback on LinkedIn promptly and professionally, ensuring our community feels heard and valued.



Key Skills and Competencies:



LinkedIn Expertise: Deep understanding of LinkedIn’s platform features, tools, and best practices, with at least 2 years of professional experience managing LinkedIn accounts for businesses or clients.

Content Optimisation: Ability to work with content and copywriting teams to turn content into engaging LinkedIn posts, utilising tags, hashtags, and other features to enhance visibility.

Analytical Mindset: Proficient in using LinkedIn metrics and analytics to drive performance improvements and inform content strategies.

Collaborative Spirit: Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams, integrating LinkedIn efforts with broader marketing and business goals.

Proactive and Trend-Focused: A keen eye for spotting emerging trends on LinkedIn and the initiative to implement them in our strategies.

Strong Communication: Excellent written communication skills, with an emphasis on clarity, creativity, and attention to detail.

Organisational Skills: Capable of managing multiple tasks and projects simultaneously while maintaining a high level of quality and consistency.



Qualifications and Experience:



Professional Experience: Minimum of 2 years managing LinkedIn accounts for businesses or clients.

Educational Background: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.

Platform Proficiency: In-depth knowledge of LinkedIn’s platform features, tools, and best practices.

Content Optimisation: Experience in adapting and optimising content for LinkedIn to enhance engagement.

Analytical Skills: Demonstrable experience with LinkedIn metrics and analytics for performance tracking and improvement.

Scale campaigns that demonstrate consistent and profitable performance

Identify underperforming areas and implement data-backed improvements

Track, analyse, and report performance metrics clearly and consistently

Collaborate with internal teams to enhance landing page conversion rates



Requirements



Proven hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns

Strong background in lead generation campaigns (not only awareness or traffic)

Deep understanding of search intent, keyword strategy, and audience targeting

Ability to optimise campaigns for conversion rate and cost efficiency

Familiarity with tracking tools such as Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and conversion tracking setups

Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and act on insights

Self-driven and able to work independently in a remote environment

Reliable internet connection and availability for full-time remote work



Application Requirements



Please include the following details in your application:



Examples of Google Ads campaigns you have managed

Performance evidence (screenshots or summary data such as CPL, conversions, ROAS, conversion rate)

Industries or business types you have worked with

Specific results you achieved (cost reduction, lead growth, optimisation impact)

Typical monthly ad budgets you have handled



How to Apply



Start your application with: GOOGLE ADS PERFORMANCE



Please read the contact instructions carefully before submitting your application.



Send your application to:



ngocyenly039



gmail ,com



(use standard emal format)

title: Trial Reel Account Manager (Instagram Posting & Analytics) – Female Only
description:
As a Trial Reel Account Manager at SimplexMedia, you will be responsible for high-volume scheduling and posting of content on Instagram, specifically for trial reel-only clients. This role requires someone who is highly organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable working at speed while maintaining accuracy.



You will manage mass posting (up to 8 posts per client per day) and support the team by helping track and interpret basic performance analytics.



Please note: this role is execution and analytics-focused and does not involve content strategy or content creation.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Posting & Account Management (Instagram)



Schedule and publish high-volume Instagram content (up to 8 posts per client daily)



Ensure all posts are uploaded accurately, on time, and in the correct format



Follow Instagram optimisation processes when setting up and managing accounts



Monitor trial accounts daily to ensure posting consistency and performance



Quality Assurance



Conduct daily quality checks across all assigned client accounts:



Are Instagram accounts set up correctly?



Are posts scheduled and published properly?



Are all required settings and optimisations in place?



Troubleshoot posting issues quickly and escalate when needed



Analytics Support



Track and record basic Instagram performance data for trial reel clients



Help identify trends in engagement and reel performance



Assist in compiling simple analytics reports for internal review



Administration & Communication



Keep all tasks and account updates tracked in Notion daily



Maintain clear communication with the team via Slack and



Stay on top of assigned administrative tasks and deadlines



Support other operational tasks as required by the General Manager/CEO



Further details will be provided during onboarding.



RESULTS



Accurate, consistent Instagram posting with no major errors



All trial clients receive their full daily posting volume



Performance data is properly tracked and available for review



Issues are communicated early and resolved efficiently



All tasks are documented and updated daily in Notion



This is full-time, UK hours 9 am to 4 pm

title: Podcast Strategist & Manager
description:
The Podcast Strategist & Manager is responsible for ensuring each weekly podcast episode is well planned, high quality, and positioned to perform strongly across YouTube and social media.







This role combines content strategy, quality control, performance testing, and podcast management, with the goal of helping each episode reach the right audience and perform at its highest potential.







Key Responsibilities



1. Pre-Production Strategy



This role begins before the episode is filmed.







Responsibilities include:



Researching each guest and identifying relevant angles and themes

Preparing the structure of the conversation

Developing topic direction and guiding questions

Identifying key talking points aligned with audience interest

Ensuring the episode is strategically positioned for strong content performance





2. Content Quality Control



After recording, the Podcast Strategist & Manager reviews the first edited draft to ensure:



The conversation flows well

Key 
nts are clear and engaging

The episode meets our quality standards

The content is structured for audience retention and clarity





3. Promotion & Growth Strategy



This role plays an active part in maximizing the reach and performance of each episode.



Responsibilities include:



Identifying strong 
nts that can be repurposed into short-form clips

Testing topics, hooks, and content angles

Supporting title and thumbnail testing

Working with the ads specialist to promote episodes ahead of launch

Ensuring each episode is set up for visibility and growth across platforms





4. Publishing & Distribution



The Podcast Strategist & Manager is responsible for ensuring all content is organized and published on time.



Responsibilities include:



Uploading and scheduling the full episode

Uploading and scheduling promotional clips

Ensuring titles, descriptions, and assets are optimized

Maintaining consistency in publishing timelines





Role Summary



This role sits at the intersection of strategy, content performance, and execution. The focus is on ensuring each podcast episode is thoughtfully planned, well produced, and positioned to achieve strong reach and engagement across platforms.







Role Details



Full-time

10am – 6pm SAST

Fully remote

title: HubSpot Developer
description:
Ultra Labs is searching for a proactive, highly organized Marketing Manager to support and strengthen our marketing operations across multiple projects and brands. Ultra Labs is a U.S.–based Business Incubator/Accelerator focused on software and tech-driven businesses.



**What You'll Work On**

- Porting React/Tailwind pages (built in Lovable) into HubSpot CMS as standalone module projects

- Building and maintaining HubSpot workflows, sequences, and dashboards

- Writing HubSpot module code using React — Component, fields, and meta exports

- Handling interactivity via HubSpot islands architecture

- Supporting ongoing CMS updates across our marketing sites



**You Need to Know**

- React (JSX, hooks, component structure)

- HubSpot CMS — standalone project setup, hs CLI, hs project upload/deploy

- HubSpot Marketing Hub — workflows, sequences, lists, dashboards

- Tailwind CSS

- Git basics



**Nice to Have**

- HubSpot CMS Developer certification

- Experience with HubSpot CRM contact/deal pipelines

- Familiarity with HubL templating



**You Are NOT a Fit If**

- Your HubSpot experience is only certifications with no shipped modules

- You've never written React outside of a no-code tool

- You need step-by-step direction on standard HubSpot tasks



**To Apply**

Skip the cover letter.

Send:

1. A link to a HubSpot module you built (Design Manager or project-based)

2. Your answer to this question — no more than 5 sentences:

? *"You're given a React + Tailwind component from Lovable. Walk me through how you move it into HubSpot CMS as a standalone module project."

3. Your rate (hourly or monthly) and availability

title: Short-Form Video Editor for DTC Brands
description:
Note: Do not apply if you do not have at least 1 year of experience working with DTC or ecommerce brands.



Job Description:



We are hiring a freelance Video Editor to create, test, and scale short-form ad creatives for a health and wellness DTC brand. This role is ideal for someone who can turn performance insights into high-converting video variations for paid social and lifecycle marketing channels. You will work closely with growth and creative teams to produce fast, effective, and brand-consistent video content that drives measurable results.



Company: Bloom & Bond

Website: 

Language: English

Availability: 30 to 40 hours per week

Time Zone: Flexible

Work Type: Freelance

Niche: Health and Wellness

Payment: $1,000 to $1,500, negotiable



Responsibilities



-Edit high-performing short-form ads for paid social and lifecycle channels with a focus on hook rate, hold rate, CTR, and CPA

-Turn briefs, UGC, testimonials, product demos, and founder clips into multiple creative versions for testing and iteration

-Apply platform-specific best practices for pacing, captions, on-screen text, and CTAs while keeping the brand look and feel consistent

-Deliver assets in required formats such as 9:16, 1:1, and 16:9 with organized project files and proper version control

-Work closely with the growth team to turn performance data into new concepts, shot lists, and updated edits on quick turnaround times

-Maintain a well-organized asset library, ensure usage rights are followed, and keep audio, color, and motion quality high



Must-Haves



-Proven experience editing performance-focused ads for DTC brands, with a portfolio that shows short-form paid social work

-Strong skills in video editing and motion graphics tools, including sound design, color correction, captions, and subtitling

-Strong understanding of creative specs and best practices for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube short-form formats

-Ability to work quickly, produce multiple versions within 24 to 72 hours, and respond fast to feedback

-Strong file organization and quality control habits, with reliable remote workflow and clear English communication



Nice to Haves



-Experience working with health and wellness brands and familiarity with compliance-sensitive creative

-Light production skills such as building shot lists, guiding UGC creators, or supporting remote talent

-Copywriting ability for hooks, voiceover, and on-screen text, plus concepting skills for ad angles and storyboards

-Comfort reviewing performance data and turning insights into the next round of tests

-Familiarity with AI-powered tools that help speed up editing, resizing, captioning, and cleanup



Benefits



-Fully remote freelance role with flexibility over your schedule and workflow

-Ongoing pipeline of performance-driven projects in the health and wellness DTC space

-Opportunity to directly influence growth results and build a strong performance portfolio

title: Video Editor
description:
Remote | Full-Time | Growth-Oriented Team 



About Us



We are a fast-growing company producing psychology, child development, health-related and other online programs that have helped millions of families worldwide. As we expand, we’re looking for a talented Video Editor who understands how to create scroll-stopping, high-converting video ads. If you’re passionate about performance marketing and creative testing, this role is for you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Edit high-performing video ads for
, Instagram, and TikTok (UGC, VSLs, short-form content)

2. Create multiple variations of ads for testing (hooks, angles, subtitles, pacing, etc.)

3. Work closely with marketing and copywriting teams to turn ideas into converting creatives

4. Add engaging elements such as captions, motion text, sound effects, and visual hooks

5. Use AI tools to speed up production and generate new creative concepts

6. Stay up-to-date with trends in paid social and direct response advertising



What We’re Looking For:



1. Experienced and dedicated video editor with a focus on performance ads

2. Strong proficiency with tools like CapCut and Adobe Premiere Pro

3. Experience using AI tools (e.g. RunwayML, Kling AI, or similar) to enhance workflow

5. Fluent English and strong communication skills

6. Organized, fast, detail-oriented, and comfortable working remotely



Preferred Candidate:



1. This position is for candidates who are willing to work full time 5-7 days a week

2. Ability to work flexible hours and adapt to dynamic project needs

3. Night working hours are not suitable, working hours should be during the daytime



What We Offer:



1. Competitive Salary: $3.00/hour, 8 hours per day, 5-7 days a week

2. After a 3-month probation period, if performance meets the organization’s expectations in terms of deadlines and quality, the salary will be increased to $3.50/hour.

How to Apply:

title: UK Group Finance Officer / Finance Coordinator
description:
Company: Vista Group

Reports to: Financial Director (UK)



A Bit About Us



Hi — I’m Ryan, 36 years old Financial Director of Vista Group.



We’re a growing UK-based group operating across children’s residential care, supported accommodation, and family support  services. Things are moving quickly, and like many founders, I’ve found myself too deep in the day-to-day finance.



I’m now looking for the right person to take ownership of this area, help bring structure and ultimately buy back my time so I can focus on scaling the business. 



What I’m Really Looking For



This isn’t just a bookkeeping role.



I’m looking for someone who:



- Thinks like an accountant / finance manager

- Is happy to get stuck into the detail

- Can take ownership across multiple companies

- And becomes a trusted right hand to me over time



This is a long-term opportunity — I’m not looking for someone short-term or task-based.



I want to build a lasting working relationship with someone who grows with me and the business.



The Bigger Picture (Important)



Vista Group is just one part of what I’m building.



I also have international business interests, particularly in the United Arab Emirates, and the vision is that the right person will:



- Support me across multiple ventures over time

- Become involved in new opportunities as they develop

- Grow into a key finance lead across a wider group



If you’re ambitious and looking for more than just a job, this is a chance to be part of something much bigger.



How We Work

- I’m specifically looking to recruit outside of the UK, i have previously recruited UK personell and i do not have time to train or accomodate inexperience 

- We will work closely together with regular communication via Microsoft Teams and WhatsApp



If you’re the right person, I’d like to:

- Bring you to the UK for 4–8 weeks to work alongside me in person to understand & embed you in our systems. 

- Or start remotely, then arrange a UK visit, before returning to long-term remote work



This is about building trust, alignment, and a strong working relationship.



Your Core Responsibilities

1. Own and enhance Our Day-to-Day Finance operations

Full bookkeeping across 11 companies using Xero. X3 main trading companies (high transactional) & x7 SPV companies (Low transactional)

Processing invoices, bills, expenses, and bank transactions

Drafting, submitting for approval & sending sales invoices and managing collections with multiple local authorities for x3 main trading companies

Imlement an effective weekly payment run process

Manage supplier payments and weekly payment runs

Bank reconciliations on all companies



2. Payroll & Compliance

Preparing and running monthly payroll for x 4 companies

Submitting PAYE RTI filings to HM Revenue and Customs for x4 companies

Managing Nest pensions scheme & filings for x 3 companies

Ensuring everything is accurate and on time

3. VAT & Financial Compliance

Preparing and submitting VAT returns for x 2 possibly 3 companies 

Supporting year-end accounts and reporting

Keeping everything compliant and organised



4. Take Control of Xero

Full ownership of our Xero environment across all companies

Cleaning up historical issues

Keeping everything reconciled and accurate

Improving structure and reporting



5. Work Alongside Our Accountants (GrowFactor)

Act as the main point of contact

Help coordinate and push forward outstanding tasks

Track progress and ensure nothing stalls

Get involved directly in clearing backlog work



6. Support Me & the Business

Help prepare management reports

Provide visibility on cash flow

Support business decisions with clear financial insight

Ultimately — take this function off my plate and take the initiative to push and drive things forward instead of awaiting instructions fro
. 



What Success Looks Like

Clean, accurate, fully up-to-date accounts

Payroll, VAT, and compliance handled without issues

Ensure all invoicing is sent and communications with Clients (Local autorities) is strong. 

Chase overdue payments and ensure cash flow maintains strong. 

Ensure all supplier bills are logged and scheduled for effective and prompt payments 

Strong communication and reliability

Clear control over finance across the group

A trusted working relationship where I can rely on you fully



Who You Are

Min 5 years in a similar role.

Experienced with Xero (essential)

Experience with planday (built by Xero) - this is our rota planning system that we use for staff payrol. This needs configuring to xere correctly. 

proficient in microsoft excel & outlook

Strong understanding of UK finance

Bookkeeping

Payroll (PAYE, RTI)

VAT

Comfortable managing multiple companies

Highly organised and detail-focused

Proactive and solutions-driven

Strong English communication skills



Most importantly:



You take ownership, think ahead, and genuinely care about the work you do.



Why This Role Is Different

You’ll work directly with the business owner

You’ll become a key part of the business, not just support

There is real opportunity to grow into a senior finance role

Potential to be involved in international projects and ventures



How to Apply

Please include:

Your experience with Xero and UK accounting

title: Google Shopping Ads Specialist (Long-Term Opportunity)
description:
We are looking for a few experienced Google Shopping Ads Specialists who can manage and scale profitable campaigns, optimize product feeds, and drive consistent sales growth for our e-commerce brands.



This is a long-term position. We are seeking talented individuals who are analytical, detail-oriented, proactive, and results-driven, and who are eager to grow with our team.



Key Responsibilities:

Plan, launch, and manage Google Shopping and Performance Max campaigns

Optimize product feeds (titles, images, attributes, pricing, etc.) to improve performance

Monitor key metrics such as ROAS, CPA, CTR, and conversion rate

Identify winning products and scale campaigns profitably

Conduct ongoing testing and optimization to improve performance

Stay updated on Google Ads policies and best practices

Take ownership of results and continuously improve performance



Preferred Experience:

Proven experience managing Google Shopping or Performance Max campaigns for e-commerce

Strong understanding of product feed optimization and campaign structure

Experience working with Shopify, Google Merchant Center, and Google Ads

Ability to analyze data and make data-driven decisions

Experience scaling campaigns profitably is a strong advantage
